name: Alan Keck
subject: Would you buy our volunteers a pizza? 🍕
body:
...because I’d rather spend today thanking our volunteers instead of finicking with our next ad.
[](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-psildt-dytiuyidkd-r/) Let me tell you, _we are blessed. Blessed with hundreds of incredible volunteers who 've donated their time and talent to spreading our vision and our Keck Game Plan to every corner of the Commonwealth._ [__**Would you chip in $16 for a pizza and leave them a note to help me say "thank you" this weekend?**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-psildt-dytiuyidkd-j/) 🍕⬇️ ⬇️ ⬇️ [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-psildt-dytiuyidkd-t/) [DONATE $2 | BUY OUR VOLUNTEERS 1 SLICE 🍕](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-psildt-dytiuyidkd-i/) [DONATE $16 | BUY OUR VOLUNTEERS A WHOLE PIZZA 🍕](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-psildt-dytiuyidkd-d/) _With the clock ticking down, our volunteers are working around the clock for a Kentucky that wins -and they're the reason we're defying the odds.**But I 'm reaching out to you personally because while today is our mid-month deadline, I'd rather spend today thanking our volunteers for their work instead of finicking with our next ad.**_ [__**Wouldn 't you agree? So, would you chip in $16 for a pizza and leave them a note to help me say "thank you" this weekend?**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-psildt-dytiuyidkd-h/) 🍕 [DONATE $2 | BUY OUR VOLUNTEERS 1 SLICE 🍕](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-psildt-dytiuyidkd-k/) [DONATE $16 | BUY OUR VOLUNTEERS A WHOLE PIZZA 🍕](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-psildt-dytiuyidkd-u/) **_It 'll mean the world for our volunteers to know that you're behind them-[_leave them a note and tell them yourself!_ ](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-psildt-dytiuyidkd-o/)_**_But as always, thank you from the bottom of my heart for your support of this campaign.**We 've come so far thus far, and I can't wait to see how far we go in this final homestretch.**_Talk soon, and God Bless! [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-psildt-dytiuyidkd-b/) [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-psildt-dytiuyidkd-n/) Alan Keck ### | [Unsubscribe](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-u-psildt-dytiuyidkd-p/)

Blessed with hundreds of incredible volunteers who 've donated their time and talent to spreading our vision and our Keck Game Plan to every corner of the Commonwealth. 🍕⬇️ ⬇️ ⬇️ With the clock ticking down, our volunteers are working around the clock for a Kentucky that wins -and they're the reason we're defying the odds.But I 'm reaching out to you personally because while today is our mid-month deadline, I'd rather spend today thanking our volunteers for their work instead of finicking with our next ad. 🍕 It 'll mean the world for our volunteers to know that you're behind them- as always, thank you from the bottom of my heart for your support of this campaign.We 've come so far thus far, and I can't wait to see how far we go in this final homestretch._Talk soon, and God Bless! Friend,
I sat down with Tucker Carlson on Tuesday night for my FIRST INTERVIEW since I was arrested and arraigned.
_Tucker asked if there’s**ANYTHING** the Democrats could throw at me that would make me drop out of the presidential race._
Without hesitation, I said, _**“NO. I’D NEVER DROP OUT.”**_
Because the fate of America hangs in the balance - and I will _NEVER SURRENDER_ our country to the radical Left.
If an unjust, and possibly illegal, ARREST didn’t even make me flinch - then I promise you, NOTHING WILL.
**Now, I’m asking YOU to stand with me as the Left tries to throw everything they can at us to _force me out of the presidential election._**

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Bank Accounts: Frozen!
body:
The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, In 1990, the Brazilian government froze the bank accounts of thousands of citizens. In 2013, the victims were the people of Cyprus. In 2022, it hit closer to home -- in Canada. The government used its 1988 Emergency Act to freeze the bank accounts of hundreds of striking truckers. Think nothing like this could happen in the United States? If so, think again. |
---
The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.
See front page is right here
It gives the Fed the power to track and potentially even control your checking account.
Not just the money you have in your account at the moment ...
But also, every single check, withdrawal, deposit~~,~~ and transaction.
Practically everything you do with your money!
[You can find out the eerie details by clicking here.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcog0oloajdrgi65lu8tbu5ae55v89kpkbj8td7o_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdj69oj5cdh2bs)
Be sure to do so with urgency.
A pilot program is already underway.
The next step is to roll it out to nearly every bank in America.
[Click here to learn how to protect your money](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zupb3lgfe0jjh83srdermc43il94k7i60g3dl6r8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdj69oj5cdh2bs).
Good luck and God bless!
---
Martin D. Weiss, PhD
Weiss Ratings Founder
P.S. This is not about a digital currency. It's very different. [Find out exactly what it is here.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrqei19bmchprr2gs1vkeu4obmrvk3mbu6qe5fh0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdj69oj5cdh2bs)

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr6k70ddbv4hcfj6jh7q2rtnbca8nbu9fvlhpoto_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdj69oj1cdh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5olb0hjae37qenugfpngod2vjtom2qkqbnvfqlg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdj69oj1cdh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zoj6ngqj10k48qkg26e1svebch1vrjc0niooo2lo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdj69oj1cdh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

Goal: **1,000 Donors

[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zp56js6ejdvtub30tno9vshugdjr6r1oveo83g8g_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdj69oj1cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z04s1ssfqdqd77tji04hke8lp16ketsfnvfeno60_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdj69oj1cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2mhjg64p13c7p0br6t9n2d1ebh125pe81hpap58_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdj69oj1cdh2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbd32uqm5k6tiub5d58re7spgrikd9l0tetpeak0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdj69oj1cdh2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zarjnrn1oeaf2uovni3rr6epno1pbllna9ikpf7g_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdj69oj1cdh2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

Kash Patel

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no “deadly insurrection.” The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It’s time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Pro Life Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Corey DeAngelis, Senior Fellow AFC
subject: How we break the teachers unions’ monopoly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
These unions are more interested in protecting the status quo and serving their own interests than helping students succeed.

| | | **_
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znk8ie0icl6o1o6sblfok4mnscrmn6oft905mmm0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdj69oj2cph238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj791jmkojfcbjkorrbdt46mqj4t5m6gpr6d9h6kp78cbkmupr6dtieoob9cdh69qj7dt46oon9dtjmmgeepb3cjjm0pd0egrqfpbhemrtcttle9r3adf0egpiasblmvb38ddgegqbectls3jmaor4stg669bhemrtbd9h6iqnbdf0e9rrcs3j4lonbduhekp7bdf36kp3b99nmmqq8o124no)
---
| | Hi Friend,
I recently spoke with Fox News about the problem with teachers unions, and I didn’t hold back. Power-hungry teachers unions consistently fight to trap kids in the failing government schools they staff. Their opposition to parental rights in education has everything to do with maintaining their control over the minds of other people's children. It's all about power. Teachers unions are more interested in protecting the status quo and serving their own interests than helping students succeed. Enough is enough. They've overplayed their hand and now we are freeing families from the clutches of the teachers unions once and for all. At the American Federation for Children, we’re taking power over education away from teachers unions and putting it back into the hands of parents one state at a time. Already this year, we’ve helped deliver HUGE wins in Iowa, Utah, Arkansas, and Florida. name: ICYMI News
subject: Claim your free subscription to Imprimis
body:
Recently, I had a long conversation with someone about our country’s difficulties.

| | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbmear2h9mvgm3q2j485vvlu8rppe2tfornjf2vg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdj69oj1clh2bs)
---
| | Recently, I had a long conversation with someone about our country’s difficulties.
They were especially concerned about critical race theory and how “progressives” are pushing this dangerous ideology into American schools, businesses, and even the military.
**They kept asking me, “what can I do?”**
That may be a question you’re asking yourself right now as well.
**My answer is always the same—EDUCATION!**
That’s because education is our surest defense against radical ideologies like critical race theory.
By supporting our educational outreach efforts, you’re reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.
But, if you want to do something closer to home, we’ve recently printed thousands of copies of our issue of _Imprimis_ ,**“Critical Race Theory: What It Is and How to Fight It,”** for you to share with your family, friends, neighbors, and colleagues.
That’s because there’s a good chance that your neighbors have never heard critical race theory, even if it’s happening in your local schools.
To make it easier for you, we’ve wrapped the copies in packs of ten, and we’ll send you one for your generous tax-deductible gift of any amount today.
The print issue is perfect for leaving at a doctor’s office or sending to teachers in your local schools.
So, not only will you support the expansion of effective outreach efforts like free online courses, classical K-12 education, and of course, _Imprimis_ , with your gift, but you can also have an effect in your neighborhood.
**To give a gift and receive your ten copies of** _**Imprimis**_**, “Critical Race Theory: What It Is and How to Fight It,” to hand out, visit the secure link below:**
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/fight-critical-race-theory-10-pack](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znjf6a43vsejcpvteoem2tj0v8ppg2duv3ogl69g_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdj69oj1clh2bs)**
Please allow me to extend my heartfelt thanks for everything you do to preserve and defend liberty for future generations.
You’re countering the far-Left’s aggressive efforts to destroy informed patriotism nationwide and in your own backyard. We greatly appreciate what _you’re doing!_
With gratitude,
Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8eu84l33bjb8e3dk8loochm60tvqp7553l2irdo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm8o36cph2bs "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next...")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb2m1p3rmkagg256fqsmf2oau09h0u2f30t5c3ro_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm8o36cph2bs "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk7fg42v23si25o8phi7ht898p3l59jknh7spd48_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm8o36cph2bs "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z367rudl5qnjdgdkpcqfo4jcn608re6te3bcjel8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm8o36cph2bs "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu1rcu4c3pas5jtvrc3g4iucqeu74embacltrca8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm8o36cph2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z93ov5vjsmdmpsvafju3hh8i3fcs5i1vo0j5jpr8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm8o36cph2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcfc5dh4sr7asps44nerqqpfif0qrpu88dldh5c8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm8o36cph2bs)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024: - Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency - Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House - Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off. So I'll cut to the chase. name: American Briefing
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbjlblrqp5m1e0osb5oalaj6dkpip0mmkm3i7f3o_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm4o72cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zp3dlf4tgvdaoak1rfad5277e4f98a5f0b24ddig_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm4o72cjh2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgujsa2d7gte85hlmrogit85gt0tq52fd0iho0d0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm4o72cjh2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

subject: Banking Nightmare
body:
During and after the Great Financial Crisis of 2008, 485 U.S. banks went under.

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, During and after the Great Financial Crisis of 2008, 485 U.S. banks went under. We warned about 484 -- an accuracy rate of 99.8% Now, I have a new warning. subject: Can you confirm this for me?

body:
This is your LAST chance.

|
---

---

**Are you there? I still haven 't heard back from you...**

Friend,

It's Kevin McCarthy. Because you are one of our _**TOP**_ patriots, I am giving you _**one last chance**_ to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership and confirm you are a patriot willing to fight for the future of our country. **[Will you please confirm before the deadline passes?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgh3ska72lnpg2jm2hdok9vmpfpfue7aj50qjab0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm4o72cjh2bs "Will you please confirm before the deadline passes?")**

---
**Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a Republican Member for the 4th consecutive year, or have we lost your support for good?**
Thank you,

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Here’s how I’d fix things in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It’s time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology.

| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16214%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kREPg6lrafKutKP2oXRj4g&sysid=1)
Fellow American -

Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival.

Here’s one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America.

Time to stop complaining and actually *fix* the problem without apology.
1. Shut down + replace the FBI
2. Shut down + replace the IRS
3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process
4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims
5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can’t be weaponized to protect a select few.

Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. **[Chip in $1 to build this movement toward our American revival.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16225%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TMhN9xQ0utKHScEnUtuRSA&sysid=1)**

Thanks,

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16214%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kREPg6lrafKutKP2oXRj4g&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** DONATE TODAY → **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16226%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fmpRKfHX%2fgw9VAKjUtoOgw&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16227%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Acq%2fN%2fz%2bWBLnQz7BFaCxEg&sysid=1)

---

| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16228%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bsEcp9rJ7eQhDWS9Y1expQ&sysid=1) | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16229%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uFo8HmOQSKhyWKk%2bM6auKQ&sysid=1) | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16220%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wYZMiC2e0KOxYZSkxk1rrQ&sysid=1)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

subject: Mainstream Media Sucks
body:

## The Flyover Newsletter delivers custom news to your inbox.
### Sign up for FREE in the next 5 days. No obligation!
Tired of the corporate elites telling you what news is important and how to think? Tired of biased TV anchors giving you their opinions instead of the unbiased facts? So are we! That's why we created [The Flyover](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvkjkm6q3gk10s4k4j582k66lrtjnnsi1i0pqsfo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm2or5cth2bs). Bias-free news direct to your inbox in the morning--letting you decide what's important. Because you don't need someone telling you how to think. [The Flyover](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9d0qf7lp1u72clv182hhgt4i9ldaiqv22prje58_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm2or5cth2bs) is a FREE email newsletter that delivers the facts directly in a timely and easy to read format. WITHOUT the spin. Join hundreds of thousands of readers who will want to stay up on the most important happenings of the day--by getting your morning news where they will be getting theirs: [The Flyover](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl6ngl9rucq8im15m1tsfavifvm4uefslnkspue0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm2or5cth2bs). Sign-up in the next 5 days for FREE. Unsubscribe at any time. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvl5u5dv7n10b40a0lof5bl6okgg75v1igifma2g_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm2or5cth2bs) The Flyover will deliver the latest stories directly to you. name: American Action News
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvpd8d51ki23canafsk6q1nlf09fq733due8d7u8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm2or5cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous Americans, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv7aq3uegnd12nq9gms8gio79o589cpdb4me4b2g_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm2or5cjh2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhgresvqqvip7ap8tc3p28teo20to03tvd6af8po_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm2or5cjh2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2sgpoa8qe202ivtkblbfi4um3fn8qajf8tsnt9o_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm2or5cjh2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0a5emslcplnglt5hpb7podtbl6l3f0sphmel17g_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm2or5cjh2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: American Defense News
subject: Don’t let them “cancel” American history
body:
I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4q88gs4kacfbjlil01h20ugmd8dgolqlrt8l428_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm6ob2cth2bs) Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include _George Washington_ and _Thomas Jefferson_ ... _Abraham Lincoln_ and _Frederick Douglass_ ... _Winston Churchill_ , _Margaret Thatcher_ , and _Ronald Reagan_. _All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale’s Michigan campus_ —one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztttnf8kqbsd7fb2niabmdcutqkc38l4ckl7sggg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm6ob2cth2bs) Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty—especially right now, a critical time for our country. **Sadly, several polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty.** And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I’ve been thinking about this for a long time. Here’s one primary reason... For decades, the “progressive” leftist academics who became dominant in most of America’s colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a **biased** and **distorted** view of American history. _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project” is a prime example. According to the “1619 Project,” the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery—and the Project’s main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America’s K–12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted—out of ignorance—to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the “progressive” Left’s influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of “political correctness.” The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of “progress” until it has “canceled” patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past—many of whom are depicted on the cards I’d like to send you. **This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away.** After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. **With the support of citizens like you—citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty—we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation’s youth.** It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project” that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America’s great heritage of liberty. **Your generous support today will...**
* **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of _Imprimis_ ...for life).

* **Send** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution.

* **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale’s free online courses such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”

* **Launch** and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens.

One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. **With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our “Liberty Walk.” The cards are a thank you for your support.** Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. **You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z44gplj39crke87j8ekttrb4jlulpcqv27csqa0o_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm6ob2cth2bs) After receiving your notecards, I hope you’ll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale’s many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. **Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty—no matter the cost.** Warm regards, Bill Gray Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf9eluovemnm8p3n2o82riu9jt1v8u8uvmmv4drg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm6ob2cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c1geapb2cdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqescahkb8c1eokfcvbqtm2k8fr0986ii9ku83o0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm6ob2cth2bs)_

name: 1600 Daily
subject: "The Genesis Story" Online Course Now on DVD
body:
In this six-lecture course, you’ll explore some of the major themes of Genesis

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmg8mtah0q6grh7nntbk6nm734c9t4hacsqdg8s8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm6ob1cph2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I hope you’re having a good day. I’m writing with some exciting news.

Hillsdale College’s popular online course, **“The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,”** is available on DVD.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlhg19nqllggisq0ccdvnkf4e469caasrn1rnfi0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm6ob1cph2bs)In this six-lecture course, you’ll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature.

“The Genesis Story” is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught the subject to undergraduate students here at the College for 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student’s theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text.

The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Dr. Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it’s important to both faith and higher education.

Then, Dr. Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.

These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.

This course on DVD is perfect for viewing in your home with your family or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs.

**For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College, you’ll receive the DVD as our thank you.**

To receive your Genesis DVD box set or to give it as a gift, please use the secure link here: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-genesis](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znt5e1a7c508fvu15anqqgn1f46tkvtecrn9j58o_rp22sh2s8i66o74cdgm6ob1cph2bs)**

As you know, Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of state and federal government funding—even indirectly through student loans and grants. That’s why your support is so crucial.

Your gift helps expand Hillsdale College’s national educational outreach efforts to educate millions of Americans nationwide, including our nation’s youth. Your gift will also help to:
* Increase the number of students taking free online courses, such as “Genesis.”
* Expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty.
* Establish and guide classical K-12 schools nationwide and provide, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.
* Promote the principles of American constitutionalism through social media and the radio.

Friend, please use the secure link above to make a $100 contribution in support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach, and explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with your new DVD set of **“The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives.”**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Your America
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16239%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uwOpjPFS5zyphz%2fUxeQOQQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16230%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E1jVJL%2fZ5JjLnoUczMqm2g&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16230%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E1jVJL%2fZ5JjLnoUczMqm2g&sysid=1) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America News
---

A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Your America News Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314 |

| **On Wednesday, the U.S. District Court for the District of North Dakota issued a preliminary injunction against the Biden Administration 's Environmental Protection Agency from implementing its final rule redefining 'Waters of the United States' (WOTUS). **
---
**A MAJOR WIN AGAINST FEDERAL OVERREACH** **"_The Biden Administration has a lengthy track record of using unelected agency bureaucrats to create overreaching rules, rather than the legislative process. This is yet another example of their desire to insert the federal government into every aspect of Virginians ' lives - by controlling small bodies of water on private property. This unlawful regulation will hurt Virginia's agricultural and development industries, putting them at risk of criminal and civil penalties. I'm glad the Court applied commonsense to reject the Biden Administration's latest overreach._"** **- Attorney General Miyares **
---
|
---
| [ ](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=7d06221bddde40ba2f2ff1e2d45cd1f2f17c565d423b128af4cb8d1642fbe57fc5c8b925776767449a3a7b3a011470f0aa8e89ae97429269)
---
| **When Attorney General Miyares sent a letter to the FBI with 19 other state attorneys general demanding an explanation for the leaked internal memo that suggested surveilling Catholics, some alleged it was politically motivated.** **Attorney General Miyares appreciates the work of the House Judiciary Committee Chairman Jim Jordan for working to get answers on this _unacceptable_ and _un-American_ plan. **
---
| | | [Read AG Miyares' February letter to the FBI. ](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=7d06221bddde40bafde22ebebb723a358ba4e640ecf74f89c54874e6d88b6227d21a55a69b85ccc12a7448c923242e4e1846881ab5ea8194)

Jason Miyares

subject: Former CIA Director John Brennan called Marjorie Taylor Greene a dangerous security risk, unfit to be in the House. We must make her a liability to the national GOP.
body:
Fighting back against treason
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te6b12cd4-7314-42a3-b039-a65982c9e7ae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _We all know Marjorie Taylor Greene, the racist, anti-Semitic, anti-gay, ignorant, cruel & incompetent loudmouth is unfit to be in Congress. _**_Yet, she just proved again, and I don't say this lightly: She. Is. A. Dangerous. Traitor._** **_The FBI arrested Justin Teixeira, a white supremacist who burrowed his way into the Air National Guard, stole and shared sensitive, classified secrets online about the war in Ukraine. It helped seditionists and genocidal madman Putin, while endangering Americans around the globe._ ** **_The utterly repulsive Greene immediately defended this scumbag traitor_** , _tweeting that President Biden was persecuting Teixeira because he's "white, male, Christian" and pro-Russia. Here's former Rep. Liz Cheney's response:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td431c519-418b-453f-9fbc-4a395c94679c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Former CIA Director John Brennan called her a dangerous security risk, unfit to be in the House. We must remove her._ **_Sadly, Greene's from a gerrymandered, pro-Trump district. Yet, we have Stacey Abrams. She already proved she can change the tide of history, when her group, Fair Fight, did such an amazing job registering and turning out Georgia voters that President Biden won there in a shocker, as did Senators Warnock (twice) & Ossoff. _** [**_Fair Fight's still changing political gravity in Georgia, and making Marjorie Taylor Greene the face of the GOP nationwide, an albatross. Will you join us in taking that first step towards removing Greene from office by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Stacey Abrams' Fair Fight?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5b5daf87-c239-4075-b1b9-36d65dd65429/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting for a Democratic America and against treason._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08891232-3ab5-4b96-a120-03c1a0ba527a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79884%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rFosRZJ32WFhWnV6CLV94A&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79884%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rFosRZJ32WFhWnV6CLV94A&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79895%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=72rINfZAxIPLQXXtAr9%2buw&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

subject: What can you do in your own backyard?
body:
Recently, I had a long conversation with someone about our country's difficulties.

| | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0a0dbf6ed2444bd8b931ea03f0743265&_e=fa4BFpmB7KoaNPNc6Do9mnI2XnjhzZ6ZuCj5_GJW9cg10OZN5fei59yNa_GeinvmrBEJYZYfyHGpCFZz6jXP43Pgl1mDgO0HDHYnlGAbyR_-T25dKydl2giVWl-RYYlJblTwzgAtzZU4X6f5dbIfpZ4K3bjQqwfavE6PdtyzWYoegO3fA6GwcJhxKcwuSyDm52QxuIC-cZLMl1_uX16PmQibmfkbzas2yDJk6eCkpPAstKvstGleGDgU8b_2Vkf7edGuY5Qyv8FQOH5d7x0y5nkIW2cdQEIpiG3GbxKgbuFh3qLn_WCAcjmiEzLSqwtPW6VqesV8u9N09MQc_jdnejUI8HDVn2vtQsl4cfD1BEZPGzV9v1jK-7UPj9U6G2FRQ3kHv4Ehpgbloav0TGg2Cm1CsKMJyhoDSwK3ETtb7Qw%3D)

| | Recently, I had a long conversation with someone about our country's difficulties.
They were especially concerned about critical race theory and how "progressives" are pushing this dangerous ideology into American schools, businesses, and even the military.
**They kept asking me, "what can I do?" **
That may be a question you're asking yourself right now as well.
**My answer is always the same --EDUCATION! **
That's because education is our surest defense against radical ideologies like critical race theory.
By supporting our educational outreach efforts, you're reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.
But, if you want to do something closer to home, we've recently printed thousands of copies of our issue of _Imprimis_ ,** "Critical Race Theory: What It Is and How to Fight It,"** for you to share with your family, friends, neighbors, and colleagues.
That's because there's a good chance that your neighbors have never heard critical race theory, even if it's happening in your local schools.
To make it easier for you, we've wrapped the copies in packs of ten, and we'll send you one for your generous tax-deductible gift of any amount today.
The print issue is perfect for leaving at a doctor's office or sending to teachers in your local schools.
So, not only will you support the expansion of effective outreach efforts like free online courses, classical K-12 education, and of course, _Imprimis_ , with your gift, but you can also have an effect in your neighborhood.
**To give a gift and receive your ten copies of **_**Imprimis**_**, "Critical Race Theory: What It Is and How to Fight It," to hand out, visit the secure link below: **
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/fight-critical-race-theory-10-pack](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0a0dbf6ed2444bd8b931ea03f0743265&_e=fa4BFpmB7KoaNPNc6Do9mnI2XnjhzZ6ZuCj5_GJW9cg10OZN5fei59yNa_GeinvmrBEJYZYfyHGpCFZz6jXP43Pgl1mDgO0HDHYnlGAbyR_-T25dKydl2giVWl-RYYlJblTwzgAtzZU4X6f5dbIfpZ4K3bjQqwfavE6PdtyzWYoegO3fA6GwcJhxKcwuSyDm52QxuIC-cZLMl1_uX16PmQibmfkbzas2yDJk6eCkpPAstKvstGleGDgU8b_2Vkf7edGuY5Qyv8FQOH5d7x0y5lCHPR4h3DJmK9pa5-BtgUDHTfTL0yyeeDaAah_cCJcfZQErehC3sWxt-JGM4NFI2eVYFAGKuiwyJ_6rxd5nYKl5bBHX2tSrQVzubWx4QivyapKDddb9QE20PN7AK4vndKIt7DyXS1QzMWxkXf3TFrk%3D)**
Please allow me to extend my heartfelt thanks for everything you do to preserve and defend liberty for future generations.
You're countering the far-Left's aggressive efforts to destroy informed patriotism nationwide and in your own backyard. We greatly appreciate what _you 're doing!_
With gratitude,
Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

Reclaiming American Freedom

name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1654873334214b6d86b7357c3a8f5e64&_e=Zew3-wU-mz3_WZr6HhY4AVS0SR2DKzzBZxsS8H8ClNhAtc3-8kaYoXnInp5pT0iGAplPiy3OqZUf3M1AJpQxBQOEIjVDzunanPKrmXbafuP02BciBGN2PXBkyMjDSWu9GCaxZKPMKNqpA57YKJPxsJjwaFG3dQmuIn5kSzjrIqL5akZqnaYDR1aFV--jmUrG5TcaJbwD93zlEdBrxh7VY3FoM7rjydPA4tB0ityA5ZDZoTVJdYZtK8DiDMXHguOzLbz94Cl9QSnjg5HQaMfM2M9LFajh4vxJH7W384YEtkSOqcY2bxVysUwIVEju93PfA8W_HoX1TgOD3TA9x6JJ1FtJGI6zG9K-d7pn07LSNeIRpu1AwnChFngicLW1hRNAGglxhUYR89XEpnb2tzRIjkk5FEkyNvB8Ut5cgVUjqXdwOARhI7BCs9hV3Q6PVL9yJzQGwZnRQhsNzpk956A4DA%3D%3D "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next... ")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1654873334214b6d86b7357c3a8f5e64&_e=Zew3-wU-mz3_WZr6HhY4AVS0SR2DKzzBZxsS8H8ClNhAtc3-8kaYoXnInp5pT0iGAplPiy3OqZUf3M1AJpQxBQOEIjVDzunanPKrmXbafuP02BciBGN2PXBkyMjDSWu9GCaxZKPMKNqpA57YKJPxsJjwaFG3dQmuIn5kSzjrIqL5akZqnaYDR1aFV--jmUrG5TcaJbwD93zlEdBrxh7VY3FoM7rjydPA4tB0ityA5ZDZoTVJdYZtK8DiDMXHguOzLbz94Cl9QSnjg5HQaMfM2M9LFajh4vxJH7W384YEtkQIHEdQ8_9B4959yh1MEHajntbpeN-dCwjxTZJcK9SR8zosRhi46jq-XghFYgtB-OjcWuVv9u_tIcQg7-Ynfp-TtGKHJZrRIblHuQBLO6VFyNe7_zPEGpmP7lbkHAEMiwGYmkLGYaQC8DyrMTWklg9DTK6YBCijouyNR-xvz1956A%3D%3D "READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1654873334214b6d86b7357c3a8f5e64&_e=Zew3-wU-mz3_WZr6HhY4AVS0SR2DKzzBZxsS8H8ClNhAtc3-8kaYoXnInp5pT0iGAplPiy3OqZUf3M1AJpQxBQOEIjVDzunanPKrmXbafuP02BciBGN2PXBkyMjDSWu9GCaxZKPMKNqpA57YKJPxsJjwaFG3dQmuIn5kSzjrIqL5akZqnaYDR1aFV--jmUrG5TcaJbwD93zlEdBrxh7VY3FoM7rjydPA4tB0ityA5ZDZoTVJdYZtK8DiDMXHguOzLbz94Cl9QSnjg5HQaMfM2CIapIYeOF8IEJxiq0Fo9GmG3p52gbpcv-7dZhgImshXeHOeZj6p9Oh65Anp9qdoJhxU8Z8kFM6D6B3482exdYaD1Hb41TnUOl5vd4rZ9mUlapZmVmP9r-4JPi4TVMNKHYz3ZGtXF5GGYGVor6uUGTU25ya0IXD52vRXFpCBp10dKh85rpPmmuydXaLi6Cn-RA%3D%3D "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. ")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1654873334214b6d86b7357c3a8f5e64&_e=Zew3-wU-mz3_WZr6HhY4AVS0SR2DKzzBZxsS8H8ClNhAtc3-8kaYoXnInp5pT0iGAplPiy3OqZUf3M1AJpQxBQOEIjVDzunanPKrmXbafuP02BciBGN2PXBkyMjDSWu9GCaxZKPMKNqpA57YKJPxsJjwaFG3dQmuIn5kSzjrIqL5akZqnaYDR1aFV--jmUrG5TcaJbwD93zlEdBrxh7VY3FoM7rjydPA4tB0ityA5ZDZoTVJdYZtK8DiDMXHguOzLbz94Cl9QSnjg5HQaMfM2CIapIYeOF8IEJxiq0Fo9GmG3p52gbpcv-7dZhgImshXIU14Df4Lp27QcHKEIeQvP_FGoOvGN2rar6nIqCe9a_EpUEBcJ-sirdJCTgkbnGJ9CbjRW8evUY_pt0uc52W2WiH3y96ovrCm4xeJpPQ9QD6_TxeyoVgi7DnfbtH40Jc3-RRj09dnyNYryAtl29P04A%3D%3D "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: End the weaponization of police power in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It's time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology.

| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d51b3b3141d4a6e93544b51289c7637&_e=37orbnr_DZTpu99o6NxUC2LA0wapX1IXRvKU0fInxgl24RTWxxVQd0fVGfWZ80yGnkpaT6igoHRKNwa0KGLaAal_q5tt2NXiPAnk1aj2G7k8iFo0AgTubLpbm_sG25t96bsZaiPmG3wbnslt7xY2FHk7aFC2tnt9Dq4zljT6BlXiaBn2fwYlwopz6Kk3TvcPP2dKArNCz_dVQtlVPKRwshdm49A9ZpE7MDU6c61lNaIo6URvwyGD3820pdAcA5UwZvmp6jPFyOenkX63zt7iyOkxRbMA98UjlgRQM8z00ZzxLSzljP61AaYMt2K7k2S6HxFAVbrdkdaS684nJKQH2CNK4XCU9uM0J8qzYHOZYGcybtSILRUxtKO7e4_nqg0J)
Fellow American -

Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival.

Here's one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America.

Time to stop complaining and actually *fix* the problem without apology.
1. Shut down + replace the FBI
2. Shut down + replace the IRS
3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process
4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims
5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can't be weaponized to protect a select few.

Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. **[Chip in $1 to build this movement toward our American revival.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d51b3b3141d4a6e93544b51289c7637&_e=37orbnr_DZTpu99o6NxUC2LA0wapX1IXRvKU0fInxgl24RTWxxVQd0fVGfWZ80yGnkpaT6igoHRKNwa0KGLaAal_q5tt2NXiPAnk1aj2G7k8iFo0AgTubLpbm_sG25t96bsZaiPmG3wbnslt7xY2FHk7aFC2tnt9Dq4zljT6BlXiaBn2fwYlwopz6Kk3TvcPP2dKArNCz_dVQtlVPKRwsu9y3te5iDViKMuOaNsv8Cu-zxlkBa7Tap99dZhbqsXiTEFkFC-d9pDRA26Dh_9xChLb-cV08_RN9clLkeowpazalGdGp2dF3fY7bxFN67RhUtecnteVc1Ti8baITgBKd8tfshnv6Ge_coNTrsOyaPJm7dWgeibBQ5rcjGqGKakR)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: It's time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology. | Fellow American - Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival. Here's one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America. Time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology. 1. Shut down + replace the FBI 2. Shut down + replace the IRS 3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process 4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims 5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can't be weaponized to protect a select few. Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Destroying rainforests
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1723727?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Picture this: Once majestic trees come crashing down as bulldozers plow over the earth. The world’s last standing forests are being turned into monoculture plantations for corporate profit. All while people, the planet, and wildlife suffer. **Wall Street giant BlackRock is putting HUGE MONEY behind companies wreaking terror on globally-important ecosystems!** [**Act now!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1723728?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) Jungles that once held vibrant ecosystems are being razed as BlackRock invests in greedy corporations slashing trees for profit. We’re losing rainforests fast. **With each second that passes BlackRock funnels more money into destructive agribusiness.** **[Help s](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1723729?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)[ave tropical rainforests from BlackRock-funded destruction by 11:59pm TONIGHT!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1723730?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1723731?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
BlackRock’s investments enable companies to _**VIOLENTLY EXPEL INDIGENOUS PEOPLE**_ from their land, turning ecosystems stewarded by communities into industrial plantations for profit. **Agribusiness is the world’s leading cause of deforestation and the violent land conflicts that come with it – and BlackRock is financing some of the worst companies out there.**
BlackRock wields **$10 TRILLION** in assets. It could use that influence for good instead of funding human rights abuses and ecosystem collapse. But **BlackRock won’t halt deforestation without a push.** **[Friend, help us reach our goal of 34 signatures from your area and tell Blackrock: STOP FUNDING DEFORESTATION!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1723732?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1723731?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Gaurav Madan
Senior forests and lands campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
