name: Corey DeAngelis, Senior Fellow AFC
subject: How we break the teachers unions’ monopoly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
These unions are more interested in protecting the status quo and serving their own interests than helping students succeed.

| | |
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a5705c9ca9974706be4d0d9bbda81bde&_e=B6bowXbvLCOuhg8TYX-BUjJnqnfTKK6P2C8bLR8KDNDnmL0XImnY_SptO8ZWuCUBAokVcVQGOPpn4EfFclhbuqbhrIpBihtlPzsVmALqtzt_BWIYsSid4hTbjGINmcoig4GJsB4owPE2tKL4J611947LLYjAXyxxukVEcqvcEKY73Ya5lAJsLx1_0EMml5h7aiorh0DwjpsmSxvRLjFD6cXYjCMDbZWEL9FkhQ9iWG4_ekGc_JFGm34c5hoPxxpE8Bg1lnMUIVqLoJzIgvod98Z08ju6BmPU-BTNWS_H4ghhHJSJ0_FnAhfmT0zYmtvjKW5RZr3dz_cwhm6iztn8EPRoE32_rS32hc6gRSpS2x4%3D)

| | Hi Friend,
I recently spoke with Fox News about the problem with teachers unions, and I didn't hold back. Power-hungry teachers unions consistently fight to trap kids in the failing government schools they staff. Their opposition to parental rights in education has everything to do with maintaining their control over the minds of other people's children. It's all about power. Teachers unions are more interested in protecting the status quo and serving their own interests than helping students succeed. Enough is enough. They've overplayed their hand and now we are freeing families from the clutches of the teachers unions once and for all. At the American Federation for Children, we're taking power over education away from teachers unions and putting it back into the hands of parents one state at a time. Already this year, we've helped deliver HUGE wins in Iowa, Utah, Arkansas, and Florida. [_**Friend, I 'm asking you to join the most important fight of our generation by pledging a donation of any amount. Can we count on your support today?**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a5705c9ca9974706be4d0d9bbda81bde&_e=B6bowXbvLCOuhg8TYX-BUjJnqnfTKK6P2C8bLR8KDNDnmL0XImnY_SptO8ZWuCUBAokVcVQGOPpn4EfFclhbuqbhrIpBihtlPzsVmALqtzt_BWIYsSid4hTbjGINmcoig4GJsB4owPE2tKL4J611947LLYjAXyxxukVEcqvcEKY73Ya5lAJsLx1_0EMml5h7aiorh0DwjpsmSxvRLjFD6Rbyqx5x1YmI3di1lmay67rwE-cfO-MWAiowTzqKj4YVv6skepd95K5DslXxc62UMsnUQ_Leh9nfUjiHMgFd1TuCjL5QBLHtD58ixjp6wKfMKBnMgJQmlMl8lyzq7q642P6sCNJ14Fr9I37JsC8HjRY%3D)

clean_body: We cannot let self-funding millionaires and their billionaire supporters spend their way into the Mayor’s Office. | = We'll get right to it: We missed yesterday's mid-month fundraising goal, and that makes it a bit harder to fully fund all of our programs — especially TV ads. Can you step up to close the gap today? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Last week, we launched Helen’s first commercial of the race, and now we’re working nonstop to get more Philadelphians’ eyes on it. Keeping our ad on air is especially important because of what we’re up against: two self-funding multi-millionaires who’ve spent millions on TV and could still spend a whole lot more. One opposing candidate has already poured $7 MILLION of his own personal fortune into his own campaign coffers. Another has gotten support from a Super PAC mired in a severe ethics investigation. We cannot let self-funding millionaires and their billionaire supporters spend their way into the Mayor’s Office. That’s why missing last night's goal is so concerning, and it's why we're asking you to help close the gap today. = = No one has worked harder and no one will work harder than Helen to build a safer, stronger Philadelphia for all of us – and we need to make sure every resident across this city knows it. Friend, I've been in politics a _long_ time.

I got my start in local politics in Baton Rouge in the 1980s, worked my way up to Bill Clinton's 1992 presidential campaign, and since then I've worked on campaigns around the U.S. and the world. **But here's the thing:**
**I have never seen a political party as cuckoo as the GOP today.**
From extending Trump's tax breaks for the wealthy to chipping away at our fundamental rights like voting and accessing health care, **the GOP of today is threatening our very democracy.**
But, friend, it gets worse. Republicans took back the House last year, so a lot of what they're planning _could actually happen._

**That's why this is urgent.** **We NEED to take back the House and hold on to our Senate majority next year, and in order to do that, we have to start NOW.**

At American Bridge, our mission is to hold Republicans accountable and DEFEAT them at the ballot box. **But we can't do it without you, friend.****[That's why I set a goal to raise $20,000 by midnight, so I am asking personally: Please, can you rush $15 or more to American Bridge right now to build up our resources so we can stop Republicans like Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis and Kevin McCarthy in their tracks?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61866006/401470826/1983311359?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=15&refcode=jtk2482-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUwZmRlZDQ5LTU3ZGMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UPuYaLtK7_pea8wO4Tv9to6DtwK9y3W2h13CSOWKoJg=)**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: NY AG Letitia James is fighting for the rule of law, deposing Trump in a lawsuit to expose his lies, while he stirs up his hateful followers against her. Let’s have her back.
body:
Trump will stop at nothing to avoid accountability
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta693e32b-5bfa-48e7-ad31-394e3e154b54/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Donald Trump had a bad April. His lawyers had to drag the befuddled non-billionaire in front of New York Attorney General Letitia James, _**_who from the very beginning courageously pursued the orangina-colored toddler's fraud._ **_James is deposing Trump for a $250MM lawsuit for lying about the value of company properties--hugely inflating them for better loan terms, massively deflating them to rip off NY and dump his tax burden on New York residents._** _So, Trump's mad:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T92a29713-e59f-4828-bfd9-a915ea650cba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Attorney General James refused to back down, even with his attacks and veiled threats against her leading to scores of death threats.**_ [**_Let's get her back, not let Trump end the political career of a talented, young, female, Black AG by making it so hard to campaign in public due to safety risks. Let's give $5, $10, $25 or whatever we can to Attorney General James for her courage in fighting for what's right, even at great personal risk._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T898b52e3-0e70-4190-a44e-aa60d1f880f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for getting the backs' of those who risk it all for democracy._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. clean_body: Trump will stop at nothing to avoid accountability | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, Donald Trump had a bad April. His lawyers had to drag the befuddled non-billionaire in front of New York Attorney General Letitia James, who from the very beginning courageously pursued the orangina-colored toddler's fraud. James is deposing Trump for a $250MM lawsuit for lying about the value of company properties--hugely inflating them for better loan terms, massively deflating them to rip off NY and dump his tax burden on New York residents. So, Trump's mad: Attorney General James refused to back down, even with his attacks and veiled threats against her leading to scores of death threats. Thank you for getting the backs' of those who risk it all for democracy. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsgE75DDNI

Hillsdale College

Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey
on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osgE75DDNI

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Your participation in Hillsdale
College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is
requested.

Your response will only take a few
minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and
the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in Imprimis,
Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme
Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the
nation's highest court: "My job is to apply the Constitution."

But progressives see the Court
differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the
bench.

Do you agree that the role of the
Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and
NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?

YES

NO

Even worse, progressives dismayed by
recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with
additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put
it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to
a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by
four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you
today...

What is your opinion about the Supreme
Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me
using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme
Court right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form
effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the
importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the proper
role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution
instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your National
Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61703538:sgE75DDNI:m:3:2532013465:6B1DF61FD9B443A426A232B2A1182787:r

Thank you for your time and
attention-and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty
since 1844

Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI
49242 USA

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isgE75DDNI

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osgE75DDNI

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

| | If our local companies are replaced with national and international large corporations, support for our communities is sacrificed. Northern Michigan's vitality depends on our friends and neighbors owning businesses that provide livable wages and community support. Our current GOP Representative votes against tax breaks for everyday, hardworking families but for windfalls for wealthy corporations. Tax reform is critical, and we must have representation in Congress by someone who understands that importance. It's time for ultra-rich corporations to pay their fair share. "Just as enough tiny droplets of water slowly fill a bucket, the growth of small businesses fills the U.S. economy. Wealthy corporations might get a lot of attention when creating jobs, but small businesses employ more people and are more resilient when times get tough. "Before coming up with something innovative that propelled them into growth, all big businesses once started small." - Martin Rowinski, Forbes Business CouncilSmall businesses of 500 employees or fewer make up 99.9% of all U.S. businesses and 99.7% of firms with paid employees. Locally owned and operated businesses provide jobs to support our communities better than the uber-rich corporate American billionaires supported by Rep. Jack Bergman.
Unlike wealthy corporations who focus their 'giving' on their own PR benefit, even small business philanthropy is more local and impactful. Neighbors and friends know their community better and invest in its prosperity.
Not only do small businesses provide more jobs, they also bring careers and opportunities. Successful small businesses put money back into their local community, which can support the creation of new small businesses and improve local public services.
[A contribution from you today](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/8cOUABeeC/c?w=xTB25b84EOaFR9bfSZOxVHdEiL91S9EC0_sw_vZa8Dg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL2JpdC5seS9GdW5kRHJCb2IiLCJyIjoiOTQzNGQ0NTItNjg4YS00NmYyLTg5NzItZmEzZmIyODJjMzY2IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0), whatever you can afford, can go a long way in fueling our people-powered, grassroots movement to enact systemic change.

My first interview since I was arrested and arraigned.

Friend,
I sat down with Tucker Carlson on Tuesday night for my FIRST INTERVIEW since I was arrested and arraigned.
_Tucker asked if there 's **ANYTHING** the Democrats could throw at me that would make me drop out of the presidential race._
Without hesitation, I said, _**" NO. I'D NEVER DROP OUT."**_
Because the fate of America hangs in the balance - and I will _NEVER SURRENDER_ our country to the radical Left.
If an unjust, and possibly illegal, ARREST didn't even make me flinch - then I promise you, NOTHING WILL.
**Now, I 'm asking YOU to stand with me as the Left tries to throw everything they can at us to _force me out of the presidential election._**

Because the fate of America hangs in the balance - and I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the radical Left. Peter, what happened here?

Two days ago, I reached out to this powerful community asking for support – and the initial response was _overwhelming_ _. _

We shot up toward our $10k midmonth goal. But then, out of nowhere it seems, donations came to a standstill – causing us to be on the verge of falling short of our April midmonth goal by 157 donations.

I’ll be honest: I’m disappointed that we may fall short of this goal, but I _refuse_ to let it get the best of me. I’m confident in the size and strength of this team – **and that’s why I’m asking you to help us make up this gap with only hours left to go. **

**Peter, I’m counting on you to be one of the 157 people I need to make a donation, so please: **[**Will you give any amount before 11:59 p.m. to help power my fight for progress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61874528/401505037/-2022127741?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1046-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDg4NWMwYi02OGRjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DY0rT46sZoUj9jkB6vQq9Udo11sOi1-7GzDg8vxrSzg=)

Peter, if you know me, you know that asking for campaign donations is probably my _least favorite_ part of the job.
And that's not to say that grassroots donations like yours don't matter because they do _– so much_ more than I can ever articulate. In fact, it's thanks to grassroots donors like you that I'm even able to hold the most powerful and corrupt forces in the nation accountable –**because I know that, no matter how many millions of dollars they spend slandering me, I have an unwavering base of supporters behind me. **
I hate asking for money because I don't want to be distracted from my work – but with fights as large and vital as ours, I just can't afford to fall short of my fundraising goals. So I have to ask: [**Please, will you chip in right now to power my fight for progress in New York and beyond? name: =?utf-8?Q?Dominic=20Rapini?=
subject: Petition to investigate possible dark money in Federal donations
body:
Are Connecticuts elderly donors being targeted for money laundering in politics? | | | | | |
---
|
---
| [Sign and Share the Petition](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=742733b0d2&e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
**Petition for CT Attorney General Investigation Into Massive Donor Irregularities**
We the cosigners of this petition urge you and your office consider this request.In Connecticut, and states across the country, a pattern is emerging where elderly donors are exhibiting massive numbers of donations in the FEC.GOV database. The data suggests that **senior citizens are being targeted** in a process that constitutes the elements of identity theft, elder abuse, and most concerning, money laundering of money to political candidates and committees.
According to FEC, the average donor donates 1.4 times a year compared to the donors we have identified that are donating to candidates and committees thousands of times each year for an extended period of time.
The questions we are asking is whether or not these are system issues related to the practice of earmarks/bundlles or are unsuspecting citizens have their donor IDs hijacked for the purpose of funneling outside money to campaigns and political committees?
2WINCT identified 18 Connecticut Residents that have collectively donated 150,896 times for a total of $2,601,914! We respectively ask the office of the Attorney General to conduct investigations to insure the privacy and integrity of these donors and the political donation process.
###
_2WINCT is partnered with Freedom Project USA to build a coalition of conservatives across Connecticut. We are committed to Constitutional principles that will reflect in our mission of recruiting and developing strong, conservative candidates; identifying and fighting for key issues that impinge on our freedoms; and to create branding and messaging programs that illustrate our values as citizens of Connecticut._
_Founded in 2019, Freedom Project USA’s mission is to defend liberty and free market principles. We advocate, involve, and educate lawmakers, job creators, and the American public about free market principles, personal responsibility, and economic freedom to allow everyone equal opportunity to pursue success._
_###_

| [Sign and Share the Petition](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=0ea011a2f9&e=8763c56857)
---
**The scope of this issue in Connecticut?**
**What does identify theft and****elder abuse look like?**
|

| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuYHM2IzhwKGpmz1Eiqq9dPcUGdsks8IGgWm0_fWVo-xev_dkvc9jwjLR-NkzdWAAN3IbA2DiBwM4ycPbGU9_Trp8WV_PpcZG3nMKPxlA-lz8d_X5SuWDoSlTpQvXg23B2sL3NbY1IudcFLd-dJ3sRqM8dtBZOyhElF1rUA2mHawsqAcOgssa60ai5JWRrVUNd-hwGIeaM8nvFCs3RzO5j7TuYansHIqpv6W0bI9JRwbHzdt99dWd4updbmRm_vrSBL-SNeXHTDGV4x7damijeC3tHAKl5D2DY7RTx4VvR9moxgglRsXEcU_hEryjPTChn76Y4Tbvq_VMaEsX82TWhMXQNTKhv5y-kjkmHxMTusU2w0ucyDGh39_yj7-mQ3rAx0WE_v3yfk38_O9XsfZuudM00YaKSX7NC7Lb_wAAAP__bQaNaA)

Friend,
The America you and I once knew and loved is gone.
_**And in its place now stands a Third World nation more like Stalinist Russia or Maoist China than a Free Republic.**_
But YOU have a choice, Friend. Biden and the radical Democrats’ tin pot dictatorship doesn’t have to be America’s reality.
Just think back to my FINAL State of the Union Address, when our country – _and YOU_ – were THRIVING and FREE.
All of that can be had once more.
But we are at a pivotal point in our nation’s history, one in which only a movement with the resolve and perseverance of _*our movement*_ can right these egregious wrongs.
There’s no other way to say it: **YOU are our country’s FINAL HOPE.**
**[Please make a contribution of ANY amount – _truly, even just $1_ – to stand with me in what truly is our LAST CHANCE to SAVE AMERICA – for 1,500% impact.](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuYHM2NjkwKFbN1spUlT10G5PkbGHZFbYIDCl219fOUp6_d7T6H0aG-aRho-O6RcGcCO_MgAmPjGAk3x5O6vTz5MpX5fv59KoRu45hc8MIH3M-L_6uFJhsDRmqk3hO3AtOFdgV6u2VopzLopb1w-o7aHGRvtGONlzpXsFrZeHVmjrhoI64CC4rFXdSCV5ZWXrdMO98qof-pozyXeKlZ-iHf17WrYwV24KxdjdUprX-6Qjg-OKbluw2iku6HMjM_sbSxtwIWfL94liKoct-sXSSvFauikESgmRwTG68cAFtoNsdGOFFoNm4rilcAnoaQtMmIevynCdtsUhE8bRxT6Ys2G2dI1MmKfTM5liwpiYMK1qM7zEkTwT5s-p-SrfYvhxu8P7R4T59vrrmvj575di6fy80zjSqjST_JoXZLd_AQAA__9WOo1b)**

---

Friend, one day the history books _(so long as the liberal censors keep their hands off them)_ will speak of an American decline unlike any our country has ever experienced.
Think back just a short while ago to our once great country under our leadership...
_Our economy was booming like never before._
_Overseas jobs were pouring back into the country._
_Cost of living was affordable._
_We were not only energy independent, we were energy DOMINANT._
_Our border was SECURE._
_The wall was being built._
_Our streets were SAFE._
_Washington swamp creatures were finally beholden to THE PEOPLE._
_We were respected on the world stage._
_We were TOUGH on China and Russia._
_Your God-given freedoms were protected._
_Simply put, we were WINNING!_

clean_body: Think back to my FINAL State of the Union Address... | | | Friend, The America you and I once knew and loved is gone. And in its place now stands a Third World nation more like Stalinist Russia or Maoist China than a Free Republic. But YOU have a choice, Friend. Biden and the radical Democrats’ tin pot dictatorship doesn’t have to be America’s reality. Just think back to my FINAL State of the Union Address, when our country – and YOU – were THRIVING and FREE. All of that can be had once more. But we are at a pivotal point in our nation’s history, one in which only a movement with the resolve and perseverance of our movement can right these egregious wrongs. There’s no other way to say it: YOU are our country’s FINAL HOPE. | Friend, one day the history books (so long as the liberal censors keep their hands off them) will speak of an American decline unlike any our country has ever experienced. Think back just a short while ago to our once great country under our leadership... Our economy was booming like never before. Overseas jobs were pouring back into the country. Cost of living was affordable. We were not only energy independent, we were energy DOMINANT. Our border was SECURE. The wall was being built. Our streets were SAFE. Washington swamp creatures were finally beholden to THE PEOPLE. We were respected on the world stage. We were TOUGH on China and Russia. Your God-given freedoms were protected. Simply put, we were WINNING! And all of this can be had once more. We can and we WILL save our country. But our mission to WIN BACK the White House and renew America’s greatness is dependent on the support of grassroots patriots like YOU. | Thank you, | Donald J. name: Democracy Action Alert (via the NDRC)
subject: Add your name to show Americans stand against so-called “Independent State Legislature Theory”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Let us know: Americans believe in checks and balances
|
---

**Team, by now you’ve probably heard of the so-called “independent state legislature theory.”**

It’s a far-right, fringe legal idea that is now central to a case before the United States Supreme Court. Commentators warn the theory could “upend elections” or even “mean the end of democracy.” That’s because it could give Republican state legislatures unchecked power to: ❌ Gerrymander maps to guarantee unearned Republican majorities.

❌ Pass voting restrictions without being held accountable – _even if the laws violate the state constitution!_

❌ Undermine presidential elections. | [Add your name to let us know:
Americans believe in checks and balances](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61877238/401516269/770530548?refcode=EM_RTI_20230416_FR_4C_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1Y2RkZWQ1LTcxZGMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XUqhSTuIj-BkIYfl1bmiA_vHONQTDr6MCrgJhd3HZy8=&emci=78d81bf0-f3da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f5cdded5-71dc-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8431045)
---
We’re already seeing the potential consequences play out, team.

Last year, in a huge win for democracy, North Carolina’s highest court issued rulings protecting voting rights and upholding fair maps. But now, Republicans are trying to circumvent those rulings – simply because the composition of the state has changed.

**Attorney General Eric Holder has warned that if state legislatures are allowed to ignore court rulings they don’t care for, it would “put our system of checks and balances at risk” all across the country.

[_He’s right – and that’s why we’re asking our grassroots supporters to help us show that the American people stand for the principles of our democracy and against this extreme ideology. Will you add your name?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61877239/401516270/770530548?refcode=EM_RTI_20230416_FR_4C_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1Y2RkZWQ1LTcxZGMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XUqhSTuIj-BkIYfl1bmiA_vHONQTDr6MCrgJhd3HZy8=&emci=78d81bf0-f3da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f5cdded5-71dc-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8431045)**
[Sign the petition](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61877240/401516271/770530548?refcode=EM_RTI_20230416_FR_4C_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1Y2RkZWQ1LTcxZGMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XUqhSTuIj-BkIYfl1bmiA_vHONQTDr6MCrgJhd3HZy8=&emci=78d81bf0-f3da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f5cdded5-71dc-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8431045)

[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61877241/401516272/2067580287?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230416_FR_4C_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1Y2RkZWQ1LTcxZGMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XUqhSTuIj-BkIYfl1bmiA_vHONQTDr6MCrgJhd3HZy8=)

clean_body: Let us know: Americans believe in checks and balances | Team, by now you’ve probably heard of the so-called “independent state legislature theory.” It’s a far-right, fringe legal idea that is now central to a case before the United States Supreme Court. Commentators warn the theory could “upend elections” or even “mean the end of democracy.” That’s because it could give Republican state legislatures unchecked power to: ❌ Gerrymander maps to guarantee unearned Republican majorities. ❌ Pass voting restrictions without being held accountable – even if the laws violate the state constitution! ❌ Undermine presidential elections. | We’re already seeing the potential consequences play out, team. Last year, in a huge win for democracy, North Carolina’s highest court issued rulings protecting voting rights and upholding fair maps. But now, Republicans are trying to circumvent those rulings – simply because the composition of the state has changed. Attorney General Eric Holder has warned that if state legislatures are allowed to ignore court rulings they don’t care for, it would “put our system of checks and balances at risk” all across the country. – The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. With the help of this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers and holding onto every single majority. **But we can’t stop now.**
We’re already preparing for our next big fight – state Democrats have a slew of special elections in the next two months, and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November. President Obama is calling out the importance of Democratic leadership in the states – it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to listen to him and help elect state Democrats now. **By renewing your 2023 DLCC membership _today_ you can help pave a path for Democratic wins this year and beyond. **
**As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight against state Republicans’ extremist agenda, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. So, can we count you in?**

We’re already preparing for our next big fight – state Democrats have a slew of special elections in the next two months, and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November. President Obama is calling out the importance of Democratic leadership in the states – it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to listen to him and help elect state Democrats now. By renewing your 2023 DLCC membership today you can help pave a path for Democratic wins this year and beyond. # New York Post \- Pols rap Hochul for backing felons over disabled military veterans in giving NY pot licenses

"Veterans should never be taking a back seat to convicted felons," agreed state Senate Minority Leader Robert Ortt (R-Lockport), an Army vet who served in Afghanistan. "Our Veterans have fought to uphold our liberties and freedoms we have today. Albany is repaying that debt by giving preferential treatment to those who have broken the law over disabled veterans. Regardless of your feelings on recreational cannabis, we can all agree that New York has their priorities wrong.

The revelations follow the slow and rocky rollout of the Empire State's recreational weed program, which has seen the setting up of [1,500 shops illegally selling pot in the Big Apple](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_95q_FoMmYeDBVbu4Uc7SmQFL8C8iA5tZQovM9_bzx3z7arOkSkB7fUUMbhbWdbz2dZulfvQFCIK2xfH45GCFxomCUxhI7cVgwy7OntqTo-W9t0TYndzek6yPAourkGuRxJVMcPoFIcf35bMOH6lmt_wL1vppTnU9YbRWn-j8Uw8N2iJqdLAEGaTEYMFvp0zBbY0mXcql3ny46lWGbMUHBDiMh3JWRaQoaDsrVL3-Ut6gBJwJ8bmfNuwLiTMxQzTEArPUBTrcls=&c=X9MAth9ZhBI5JsZF08Cwr5iWxGPMe6rIwYOfcgZ8tcc8JJMScZs_Gg==&ch=AXPgyc4e7EaovylRt1jiDoA4XiQ2MKv4L64b9PvQhCnYYI0gxVVekg==) while only 7 state-licensed dispensaries have opened for business.
"The idea of giving ex-cons a license to sell pot, along with a free dispensary courtesy of the taxpayers, shows their deranged priorities and their continued failure to roll out a legal market in NY," said Sen. George Borrello (R-Jamestown).

Peter Willis,

Here’s the big news some people don’t want
to talk about: Progressives are notching major wins in city after city,
out-organizing big money, and setting a blueprint for progressive power in
the party.

In just the past few weeks, your support helped power Brandon Johnson to
victory over America's most powerful political establishment in Chicago,
restore Justin Jones to the Tennessee House, and win a progressive
trifecta in St. Louis.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8599?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230416_FR_PhillyPittsburgh_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_PhillyPittsburgh&t=1010&akid=4198%2E5885482%2EO7zoiX ]Can you help us repeat the magic of Chicago in Philadelphia by rushing
a donation to support our work to elect our next progressive mayor Helen
Gym? This win would be huge for our movement, and every bit helps!

“The fact that we were able to out-organize big money with people power
speaks to the growth of the progressive movement as a political force,”
Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told The Guardian

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8599?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230416_FR_PhillyPittsburgh_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_PhillyPittsburgh&t=1011&akid=4198%2E5885482%2EO7zoiX ][IMG]

We’ve proven we can beat back the unholy alliance of school privatizers,
police unions, big corporations, and GOP mega-donors. We did it in Chicago
— outspent 2:1 — and we can do it again in Philadelphia!

Our Revolution is all-in for Helen Gym for Philly Mayor! Just like with
Brandon in Chicago, Helen is a former teacher and union organizer with a
powerful coalition behind her. And Sara Innamorato, who we backed in 2018
alongside now-US Rep. Summer Lee for the PA House, is running for
Allegheny County Exec — a key seat in Pittsburgh!

“These are two incredible progressive women building power in cities with
a real chance to win,” OR Political Director Aaron Chappell told Politics
PA

Already, the Republicans are up to their dirty tricks in a concerted
effort to register as Democrats and vote against Helen Gym in the primary!
We can’t let them stick us with a corporate Dem heading to lead this blue
city.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8599?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230416_FR_PhillyPittsburgh_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_PhillyPittsburgh&t=1012&akid=4198%2E5885482%2EO7zoiX ]We’re deploying our resources to make sure Helen and Sara get elected.
Can you pitch in to help fund our voter turnout operation of more than
100,000 Our Revolution supporters in Philly and Pittsburgh?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

body:
We’re in election season now, fellow activist.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61878613/401519532/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230416Looming_N_TEAM_90DO_7_NG_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwZTRmZTcwLTc2ZGMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2Jpd71ebqFrnrDl0Tt5ZMqpcAbZFPjqlab36ubCPZuA=)
| Fellow activist,

The May 16 Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary is looming right around the corner, and we need to mobilize NOW to get out the vote in Pennsylvania.

We know there are truly no “Off-year” elections, as every election affects Pennsylvanians' lives directly. These Municipal/Local/Judicial Elections do not get the attention they deserve, especially in the primaries. It’s part of why constant, year-round voter registration and get out the vote efforts like ours are so crucial to empowering our historically disenfranchised and neglected communities to elect the representation they deserve.

**[By transforming the electorate to reflect our communities in every election, we can transform the Commonwealth’s politics from the ground up. Can you donate today to not just defend our democracy from the MAGA GOP, but achieve a more reflective democracy?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61878614/401519533/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230416Looming_N_TEAM_90DO_7_NG_A_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwZTRmZTcwLTc2ZGMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2Jpd71ebqFrnrDl0Tt5ZMqpcAbZFPjqlab36ubCPZuA=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61878615/401519534/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230416Looming_N_TEAM_90DO_7_NG_A_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwZTRmZTcwLTc2ZGMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2Jpd71ebqFrnrDl0Tt5ZMqpcAbZFPjqlab36ubCPZuA=) We’ve talked a lot about how right-wing extremists are scheming to win local elections so they can sabotage our elections, disenfranchise our voters, and stifle our democracy in every way possible.

But that’s not all we’re fighting for. With your help, we can expand the electorate to include the voices of those who have been disenfranchised and neglected for far too long and build a more reflective democracy for all of us.

To do it, and overcome the many obstacles the PA GOP have put in our way, we need to keep up our work year-round, expanding the electorate in EVERY election. **[Local elections build the very foundations of the progress we’re trying to make – especially with how many important election decisions Pennsylvania leaves up to local elections boards. Will you invest in progress in the Commonwealth now with a donation of clean_body: We’re in election season now, fellow activist. = | Fellow activist, The May 16 Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary is looming right around the corner, and we need to mobilize NOW to get out the vote in Pennsylvania. We know there are truly no “Off-year” elections, as every election affects Pennsylvanians' lives directly. These Municipal/Local/Judicial Elections do not get the attention they deserve, especially in the primaries. It’s part of why constant, year-round voter registration and get out the vote efforts like ours are so crucial to empowering our historically disenfranchised and neglected communities to elect the representation they deserve. = = We’ve talked a lot about how right-wing extremists are scheming to win local elections so they can sabotage our elections, disenfranchise our voters, and stifle our democracy in every way possible. But that’s not all we’re fighting for. With your help, we can expand the electorate to include the voices of those who have been disenfranchised and neglected for far too long and build a more reflective democracy for all of us. To do it, and overcome the many obstacles the PA GOP have put in our way, we need to keep up our work year-round, expanding the electorate in EVERY election. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. Friend, this is horrifying: There have already been** over 140** **mass shootings** in 2023.
The recent shootings in Tennessee and Kentucky remind us of the horrific, senseless nature of these tragedies, which are altogether preventable.

Assault weapons are the weapon of choice for mass shooters – and we can ban them.

Thousands of lives have been taken and hundreds of communities have been forever changed by mass shooters using military-style assault weapons. And, a majority of Americans support banning these military-grade weapons from civilian use! So, what's the problem?

As usual, **Republicans are too afraid of losing corporate donations from the gun lobby to support commonsense gun safety laws. **
That's why we’ve launched this petition to ban assault weapons **– we're showing the GOP that enough is enough. B ut we need 10,000 signers before our midnight deadline, and we're missing your name. Please, sign the petition to show your support for an assault weapons ban.**

All for nothing._ **_These young Black lawmakers risked everything. They're getting death threats. They'll be targets of nutball right wingers for the rest of their lives. __Let's _****_send a powerful message to the Tennessee 3 and all Democrats that we're with you in the fight!_** [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to these fighters to continue to stand up to authoritarianism?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdf584d3d-661e-4edd-bf20-2323ac5e39a6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting for democracy and equality for us all._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbecc9633-9224-453b-b538-8efbbded74f4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Yesterday, our team reached out because tomorrow at midnight is our filing deadline. Peter,

Yesterday, our team reached out because tonight at midnight is our 30-day pre-primary reporting deadline — and it's a big one. This will mark the first time our fundraising numbers for the year will be made public, and we know Andy's opponents will be watching.

**Luckily, Kentuckians from across the Commonwealth have stepped up in the last 24 hours to help us send a message that they're ready to re-elect Andy!** Peter, we have momentum, and we're so close to reaching our filing deadline goal. But with just a few hours left, we can't slow down now.

name: Adrastos, Campaign Manager for Team Cori
subject: Breaking news out of Missouri
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
This is appalling.
#
I have breaking news to share out of Missouri, Peter:
The Missouri Attorney General issued an emergency rule that basically **_bans_** gender-affirming care for trans adults.
**This is disgusting and indefensible.[Please consider making a donation to the St. Louis Queer+ Support Helpline, so they can continue their work providing LGBTQIA2S-affirming support.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/1186?t=1&akid=2527%2E1082990%2ETbdQXW)
This emergency rule would **_force_** three documented years of gender dysphoria and 18 months of therapy before being able to access gender-affirming care. It also bans adults with autism or depression from receiving gender affirming care.
Cori will always stand with and fight for the entire LGBTQIA2S+ community, especially our trans allies who are being attacked by so many far-right extremists right now.
[**That’s why today, we’re asking if you can support the St. Louis Queer+ Support Helpline, so they can continue supporting LGBTQIA2S+ folks during these homophobic and transphobic attacks. Please consider donating to support their work today.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/1186?t=2&akid=2527%2E1082990%2ETbdQXW)
**[Donate](https://act.coribush.org/go/1186?t=3&akid=2527%2E1082990%2ETbdQXW)**
Thank you for your help,
Adrastos, Campaign Manager
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230416?refcode=em20230416-2527-footer&t=4&refcode2=2527_1082990_TbdQXW&akid=2527%2E1082990%2ETbdQXW) **

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: We’ve got quite a long road ahead of us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Today, I want to take a moment to tell you a little more about the campaign we’re building — and why your early support is so critical.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=173%2E35263%2EOpFGJA)
Peter, You may have seen that earlier this week, I announced my reelection campaign to continue serving Wisconsin in the U.S. Senate. Today, I want to take a moment to tell you a little more about the campaign we’re building — and why your early support is so critical. **Here’s the deal: This campaign is not going to be about me — it will always be about working for you.** It will be about standing up for your families, your health care, your jobs, and your retirement. And it will be about building on the progress we’ve made together — making sure you have the leadership you deserve in Washington. That’s what my work has always been about. It’s why I proudly cast my vote to fight climate change, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and expand health care for our veterans. It’s why I’ve fought so hard to protect marriage equality for all Americans. It’s why I’ve defended Medicare and Social Security from those who want to tear those critical resources away from folks relying on them. **[You’ve been by my side in fight after fight. Now, I’m asking if you’ll stand by me once again by becoming an official Founding Donor to my reelection campaign:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_NO_20230416_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=173%2E35263%2EOpFGJA)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-launch23.kLC5-H&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_NO_20230416_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=173%2E35263%2EOpFGJA)

But I know I won’t have to fight back alone. Your early support in this race will help ensure my team and I have the resources we’ll need to take on anything coming our way, and I couldn’t be more grateful to have you with me.
Thank you in advance for anything you’re able to pitch in today as we get this campaign started.

name: Sign the Petition | Left Action
subject: Tell Congress: If Jim Jordan wants to hold hearings on crime, how about we start with his coverup of sexual assault?
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Add your name: Tell Congress to Hold Hearings on Jim Jordan's coverup of sexual assault >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T56a0e561-0798-44ca-860f-c899709e3f15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1fec74a-a4f7-452b-946e-6cd09da3b863/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Representative Jim Jordan and House Republicans are blatantly interfering in the NY criminal case against Donald Trump, and [trying everything they can](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfe209266-ee8c-4b6f-9093-a3aca28f4ed5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ to pressure the Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg to drop it.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td91839ed-2d26-4bb8-8d19-184dc6c96c3d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Jordan is even going so far as to hold a hearing in New York on crime--even though cities in his own home district have significantly higher crime rates. **If Jordan wants to hold hearings on crime,[ how about we start with one on ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6a8cdbe6-1107-488e-ab46-5f7cc60e8105/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[his own coverup of sexual assault](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta73e7657-704b-4f23-84fa-4a9b8db0bfb6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ when he was a coach at Ohio State University?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te022013c-5d3a-4353-9622-cbe53ee79c89/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** _" Vazquez is one of six former OSU wrestlers who told CNN in recent interviews that they were present when Jordan heard or responded to sexual misconduct complaints about team doctor Richard Strauss. Eight others say Strauss' inappropriate behavior was an open secret in the athletic department and that Jordan, among others, must have known about it."_ ([CNN](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta0104932-1478-467f-913a-59d82afe90d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)) If Jordan wants hearings, bring it on. And if indictments follow, maybe Jordan and Trump can share a cell. [**Add your name, and tell Congress to hold a hearing on Jordan's coverup of sexual assault at OSU.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T63a9fabd-4661-4d53-b0e4-5e98bee9f61d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T207057d3-161b-4a74-aa25-b815d0f94054/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_

| Peter,

It’s Isa from Abigail’s campaign team with an important update.

**_FIRST_** \- The National Republican Congressional Committee invested tens of thousands in attack ads against Abigail.

_**THEN**_ \- The same group named her one of their top targets in 2024.

_**NOW**_ \- They’re launching a billboard campaign in our district attacking Abigail.

National Republican groups are getting to work early in the hope that they can flip this seat red in 2024 – and we need to respond. [_**Will you contribute to our campaign right away so we can defend Abigail’s seat?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61889057/401532805/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230416-z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDVhNjc0MGYtODFkYy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0m6dIJYDk8rQtAP8ytWJc0WXs4hLBKCEdiNwJ_9CbHA=)

clean_body: Time and again, we’ve defended this seat and we’ll do the same this cycle. But we need your support to do it. | = | Peter, It’s Isa from Abigail’s campaign team with an important update. FIRST \- The National Republican Congressional Committee invested tens of thousands in attack ads against Abigail. THEN \- The same group named her one of their top targets in 2024. NOW \- They’re launching a billboard campaign in our district attacking Abigail. National Republican groups are getting to work early in the hope that they can flip this seat red in 2024 – and we need to respond. = | = This isn’t new territory for our campaign. Abigail has had an enormous target on her back ever since she flipped this seat blue for the first time since 1968! Time and again, we’ve defended this seat and we’ll do the same this cycle. But we need your support to do it. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Isa Djerassi Team Spanberger * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. subject: To Pres. Joe Biden: I stand with you.

body:
| | We’re SO ANGRY → **_Jim Jordan just launched a baseless investigation into President Biden!_
**
Jim Jordan is doing Trump’s dirty work in Congress — _disgusting!_

He’ll do whatever he can to DESTROY President Biden and his powerful Democratic agenda... _so we’re making a HUGE call to Democrats everywhere._

[50,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: Sign our EMERGENCY petition to show President Biden we stand with him »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230416_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=7106%2E878179%2ED4hKwH) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden?refcode=VPP_20230416_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=7106%2E878179%2ED4hKwH) | [**SIGN NOW: STAND WITH PRESIDENT BIDEN AGAINST REPUBLICANS’ BASELESS INVESTIGATION »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230416_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=7106%2E878179%2ED4hKwH)
---
Jim Jordan is DESPICABLE.

This investigation is baseless and a waste of time — but it’s already gaining MASSIVE support from Republicans everywhere.

**If we don’t act fast, they’ll end Joe Biden’s career and sweep Donald Trump back into the White House...**

[We need 50,000 signatures by tomorrow to show Jim Jordan Democrats EVERYWHERE stand with President Biden »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230416_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=7106%2E878179%2ED4hKwH)

Don’t abandon President Biden,

_VPP_

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Peter, I just got an update on our goal, and we still need** 120 more supporters** to activate their Emerge Community Membership by midnight tonight!
We're asking folks to activate their memberships because we're at the forefront of getting trailblazing women of the New American Majority on the ballot. **When you donate to Emerge, you'll help:**
| | | | Fuel Emerge's for-women-by-women programs to shatter glass ceilings in politics.
|
---|---|---|---
| | | | Ensure that ALL of our communities have a voice in the rooms where decisions are made.
|
---|---|---|---
| | | | Protect our fundamental rights from far-right attacks in every corner of our country.
|
---|---|---|---
I’m personally reaching out to you because I know you’re as committed as we are to breaking glass ceilings in politics and empowering Democratic women who will fight for our communities at every level. **But it’s going to take a collective, community effort!**
**There are only a few hours left, so please don’t wait. Use this link to donate any amount and activate your Emerge Community Membership before our midnight deadline: **[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emerge2023**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61889281/401533005/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1185-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhhNmIwMTMwLTgxZGMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4qzleQoyvodEWD0L9KIvO58GRMFSZX4HkX1EydTJb1s=)
Transforming politics takes community effort, and we can’t do this work without you. Thank you.
A’shanti Gholar
President, Emerge

| | | Peter, This is absolutely unbelievable.

**The FBI used Catholic and Christian churches as “new avenues for tripwire and source development.”**

_And what was the reason?_**So-called “extremism” and “domestic terrorism.”**

**Peter, I am absolutely OUTRAGED.**

In Joe Biden’s Godless administration, people of faith are under attack by the federal government.

**Your right to practice your faith is in jeopardy - and we MUST take action. **

In addition to raising big money for the party, the event is a summit for GOP organizers and activists from across the Commonwealth. Their goal is clear: Take back the Virginia Senate and keep the House of Delegates in GOP hands. The fact of the matter is, this event is going to raise a ton of cash, so Democrats have to fight back in a big way if we want to catch up. = With the slate of primary candidates now officially set, and with Virginia Republicans poised to rake in big bucks towards their goal of total Republican control in Richmond, Democrats need to step up our efforts right now. We’ve seen a drop in donations the past few months, but we’re setting an ambitious mid-month fundraising goal of $15,000 to close the gap. Mark is counting on us to step up and make sure the Virginia GOP does not gain a massive financial advantage this coming weekend. It’s time to show them what we’re made of. = Thank you for your support, Team Warner **= | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

clean_body: Today marks 100 days of Kevin McCarthy and Republicans in charge of the House. And I’ll be honest, as someone who had very low expectations going into it, they’ve somehow gotten even less done than I thought. | = | Peter, Today marks 100 days of Kevin McCarthy and the GOP in charge of the House. I’ll be honest, as someone who had very low expectations going into it, they’ve somehow gotten even less done than I thought. By ceding so much power to Marjorie Taylor Greene, McCarthy can’t even get consensus within his caucus on what bills to bring to the Floor! So, I thought it might be helpful for us to tell them what to do instead! Can’t hurt to try? It’s a frustrating time, but it’s important for Democrats to stay focused on the issues that matter. While Republicans open “investigations”, spread conspiracy theories online and spend their time stoking culture wars, we will talk about the problems facing our families. \- Josh

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Another pro-criminal bill
body:
The 2023 legislative session is careening into its last week with Democrats repeatedly meeting in the dead of night to hide their unpopular policies from voters. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61708604:WGNR5DDN9:m:1:2610672541:19C795E5A0715E26DBC328DB81C7BCC2:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

The 2023 legislative session is careening into its last week with Democrats repeatedly meeting in the dead of night to hide their unpopular policies from voters. But as always, we here at Shift WA have you covered with insights into what is going on in your own political backyard! Read on...

**This week 's Newsmaker Interview...**
Senator Ron Muzzall (R - Oak Harbor) joined us for this week's Newsmaker Interview. Senator Muzzall is the Ranking Republican on the Senate Agriculture, Water, Natural Resources and Parks Committee. Sen. Muzzall informed us of the Inslee Administration's many "broken promises" and failure to follow the law by not providing an exemption for farmers from the skyrocketing fuel prices thanks to the Democrats' expensive "Cap and TradeTax" energy policies. He blamed the urban Democrats' "downright disrespectful views of agricultural workers" for the radical overtime wage policies which are financially hurting both the state's farmers and farmworkers. [Read more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61708605:WGNR5DDN9:m:1:2610672541:19C795E5A0715E26DBC328DB81C7BCC2:r) _._

**This week 's top story...**
Democrats' latest pro-criminal legislation - House Bill 1324 (HB 1324) - literally prohibits a court from including juvenile court convictions when considering sentencing crimes committed as an adult. For Democrats, if you don't actually kill anyone when you are under 18 years old, the crime cannot be included as part of the "Three Strikes, You're Out" law passed by the voters back in the 1990's. But that's not the only pro-criminal bill under consideration this legislative session. [Read more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61708606:WGNR5DDN9:m:1:2610672541:19C795E5A0715E26DBC328DB81C7BCC2:r).
**In case you missed it ...**
It appears that Sound Transit ignored all warnings about the perils of running electrified rail across a floating bridge only to run into some reality. Continuing the long-established pattern of overpromising and underdelivering, Sound Transit is once again delaying the target opening of the I-90 light rail project across Lake Washington. [Read this story and more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61708607:WGNR5DDN9:m:1:2610672541:19C795E5A0715E26DBC328DB81C7BCC2:r).

P.S. Have you signed up for our Daily Briefing? If not, please take a moment to sign up now by [**clicking here**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61708608:WGNR5DDN9:m:1:2610672541:19C795E5A0715E26DBC328DB81C7BCC2:r).

P.S.S. To get early insight into what might make Shift's next Daily Briefing worth reading, tune in to 570 KVI on your AM dial weekday mornings at 8:05, to hear John Carlson talk Washington State legislative politics with Shift co-founder Randy Pepple. And you can always stay for the rest of the Commute with Carlson by tuning in [**here**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61708609:WGNR5DDN9:m:1:2610672541:19C795E5A0715E26DBC328DB81C7BCC2:r). | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61708610:WGNR5DDN9:m:1:2610672541:19C795E5A0715E26DBC328DB81C7BCC2:r)
---
|

If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14181521&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWGNR5DDN9).

I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself: my name is Rio Diaz and I am so excited to be Susan’s new Finance Director.

name: David Horowitz
subject: 2024 is the final battle
body:
And this crucial information needs to be in the hands of every American patriot.

| |
---
| |
---
| | I’m writing you this email today because I’ve learned critical information about the far-left’s plan to turn America into a socialist nation that will rock you to your core. My latest book **“[ Final Battle: The Next Election Could Be the Last](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665772%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5tPQiWDIxKk%2fslMtlq406w&sysid=1)”[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665773%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kVJbDQVYZEMWpXWbbLIHWQ&sysid=1)** lays out how the left plans to influence our elections to destroy the very freedoms America was founded on. And this crucial information needs to be in the hands of every American patriot. But don’t take my word for it - take the word of Donald Trump and other patriots concerned for America’s future.
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665774%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8MvUIyLFvsRPoxCHCZfDMw&sysid=1)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| "David Horowitz exposes the outrages perpetrated by the Biden administration and the Democratic left."
---
**\-- Dinesh D’Souza** **New York Times Bestselling Author and Filmmaker**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| _"Final Battle_ may be the most devastating book-length indictment of the Democratic Party yet written. This is nothing less than a handbook for the salvation of the United States of America.”
---
**\-- Dennis Prager** **Nationally Syndicated Radio Talk Show Host**
---
| | |
---
| | **With your donation of $35 or more today, I will mail you a copy of my must-read new book _Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last_.** Thousands of patriotic Americans who felt disenfranchised after the 2020 elections are reading my book, **“[ Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665785%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=46Qp8Mbo%2fBRPZr6xk2ODNg&sysid=1)”** They’re learning about the damage the radical left has done to the integrity of our elections and what you and I need to do to fight back and restore America.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665786%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UztnA5vRUDUB1pYouP9qoQ&sysid=1)
---
| | You see, 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary determined to bring America as we know it to its end...
---
**_I was one of them ... before I saw the truth..._**
---
| | That’s how I know the radical Left inside and out-- because I was deeply involved. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ - the largest magazine for radical Marxists. But after the Black Panthers murdered my friend and aided the Communists in Vietnam, I finally opened my eyes to their lies. I cast my vote for Ronald Reagan, and never looked back. And ever since, I’ve dedicated my life to exposing and destroying their radical plans for our country. That’s exactly what I write about in my latest book **[Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665785%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=46Qp8Mbo%2fBRPZr6xk2ODNg&sysid=1)** **That’s why I’m asking you to join me and thousands of other Americans in this fight, through a donation of $35 or more today. With your $35 donation I’ll send you a complimentary copy of Final Battle so you can read the truth the Left is fighting so hard to keep out of your hands.** The Left thrives when no one knows what they’re doing, why they’re doing it, or who’s helping them do it. That is why I’ve dedicated my life to exposing the methods and motives of the radical left to American patriots like you.
---
| | In Freedom,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. As Trump said in his speech in Waco, TX: “2024 is the final battle, it’s going to be the big one.” We must arm as many Americans as we can with the truth about 2020 and the leftist plans for America. **Will you donate $35 today so I can mail you your copy right away?**
---

Peter, we'll be honest: The extremist Republican agenda has been just as radical as we feared. _Take a look >>_

Over the past 100 days, Republicans have prioritized:
❌ Enacting dangerous anti-abortion legislation
❌ Censoring history and acceptance by banning books about civil rights, the LGBTQ+ community, and the Holocaust

❌ _And so much more._

body:
I’m the most vulnerable Senator up for reelection next year, and Mitch McConnell and his GOP cronies are already raising big money to attack me. We need to be ready to respond. |

_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61892844/401538979/-246429796?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGM1YTE5MC05MGRjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D7pjkSyFw9VP9dWFZSXNIoJl-wywlwh55o-1rFrSsp4=)
I have an important state-of-the-race update for you: **First:** Democrats lost our House majority, making the Senate the last line of defense in the fight for reproductive freedom, getting dark money out of our politics, and more. **Then:** Political experts from _CNN_ to Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ kicked off the 2024 election cycle by saying that Montana is one of the GOP's top targets. **Now:** I’m the most vulnerable Senator up for reelection next year, and Mitch McConnell and his GOP cronies are already raising big money to attack me. We need to be ready to respond. [_**We can’t — and won’t — win without the support of this grassroots team. So if you can, split a donation now between my campaign and Eric Swalwell's to help us overcome the attacks and defend Montana. Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e9c871fa245e424db43dadc69dcbfd2a&_e=4dMaZ_p6r3Ykrik4XZ-xf3WzP050MEYmhyCZ3SZpLl8u7iq2kNUZ4pBoBWdv9MJW5gyu5E1Nh287Pbcc2rYReF3Qdnq0wz5EYOd7dRvRubtc2Woz8pGDggCnuiaK0fG4lNfnzSLAMgYOIXsSr2kk0-hBT25J5TA1PjVlt6-bVnNQWXYn0ioXzx0vPI-rD4T1BstIFpJmuajm3dwVnSMTU8I2aIu63jJnKR8dZEfH8hCvSwfbzLmAJZQkzsnC3P7QWGTl5iYXUmHZXHJH1LxvSv8uUPi8j6sFXT9Y6ga8GuveXV1B-oy8Vd5VRZAK8DbH4Nxx2d_zz9qQaDsqOzokAHgGErhF1YuffKffcA3zHJV8WklxHCiCre1hF6JncoPr1wlCADrCvoMOkeyUfoWN5V2_7q8hDNsOzbtBH0eLFRU%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: State Dems HQ (via DLCC.org)
subject: 3 new supermajorities
body:
With a supermajority, Republicans don’t have to worry about compromise – they have almost unlimited power and can override the Governor’s veto on almost any issue... | | |
---
| | Republicans have gained _three_ new supermajorities in states with Democratic Governors. When the GOP has full supermajorities, it means that they can pass whatever legislation they want – banning books, disenfranchising voters, and outlawing abortion – _and Democratic Governors don’t have the veto power to stop them._ With supermajorities, Republicans don’t have to worry about compromise – they have almost unlimited power. **These GOP supermajorities are dangerous, and will lead to harmful laws and an erosion of our democracy.** [This cycle, we have a chance to reverse the GOP’s gains and end their stranglehold on power in states like Wisconsin and North Carolina. But to do it, we need your help. Can you donate $7 right now to help the DLCC defeat GOP candidates in the states? >> ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zg_VLrMrMFvj2eg_NergVk0RMpp5VCBNbBXS7sUaF4OI6XhWyhUptxICfEtFb8cbTahiIq4ccGkOzf8tAWkGq8LQjDdI1OIVSdz_MD9Dec3kj-zkrU_0scsgSF3Eke0u0X7GX2tOlFKq-m_VWC6SetEQjd4xwUkRahhRDn_mMYO7F8fGJoEnQEwesNkRD2yPwaZAhpwypjvJNkr1Mmz_WIUtylC0Z1o2-JnLGVcbCRNQw_hBkDZc6PZyLN7EbpmKbiPaISVERaNJfh3AnQLyCI5b2BGBeLO4FmjvqXkH9hPqe6SAKOCwEzpHVsa4yhoD69pkFS4sGr2Wmbz_Dok2c1NRWxmoO8hnfdWkp5G__CIdyppTbRjI2yuDmxcLe-jJk/3ve/R-K4ZGVATyGmcasc467tng/h0/yMwKV_-llHbVI_670TJtIOqsBgz0U-miW0IH6SsF1S0) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

Winning won’t be easy. Just this month, Democrats were narrowly defeated in a state Senate special election in Wisconsin.
Wisconsin and North Carolina’s legislatures have been swamped by Republicans in power for years, and we need to give Democratic Governors Tony Evers and Roy Cooper allies to help them deliver for their communities.
State Democrats are our best line of defense against the MAGA agenda, and investments to dismantle the GOP’s supermajorities will help build back power, protect the path to the presidency, and ensure Democratic governors can veto extreme Republican legislation.
**Our strategic plan relies on a strong team of grassroots supporters that includes you. Without you and tens of thousands of advocates joining in, our party can’t accomplish any of our goals.**
****
[Can we count on you to chip in? Rush a donation of $7 now to end the GOP’s run on power in states across the country >>](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zg_VLrMrMFvj2eg_NergVk0RMpp5VCBNbBXS7sUaF4OI6XhWyhUptxICfEtFb8cbTahiIq4ccGkOzf8tAWkGq8LQjDdI1OIVSdz_MD9Dec3kj-zkrU_0scsgSF3Eke0u0X7GX2tOlFKq-m_VWC6SetEQjd4xwUkRahhRDn_mMYO4Kng8ABXaWlMl0To8q864AuvTNu-3HMjLAxmcSm_R55c6CkhKqYx_dMoStK_eL-M82X2hF0wqfv7lq1QF4gkkpTQ0fTdFPkK1RayqFQU7YMYdqAaMqmikkNeVcaOz-rhg75B7xIHg0c-P2mvfIHRYgVobtIHhx_-T1x4dv0JqWU3n9uG5r085VGDfip8bS1Fl2ZL14ktMNslFd_Eifb-_E/3ve/R-K4ZGVATyGmcasc467tng/h6/OSTqsPUDY02mcyn0qqWojZ7aG8ysYzfE9jshZiqeQiA)

subject: Joe Lombardo’s attack on Nevada’s elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:

Friend,
I had an incredible time at the NRA Convention on Friday, speaking to a room packed with patriots who want one very simple thing... _to be FREE._
The Left wants to take away your guns while throwing open the jailhouse doors and releasing blood-thirsty criminals into your communities.
They want to abolish your borders and impoverish your families while spending your money on endless and very, very stupid foreign wars.
They want to demonize patriots and persecute Christians while pushing the transgender cult on your children.
**But with your support, I promise to lead the great rebirth of American freedom.**
_We will build a future where we are free of violence, free of crime, and free of fear._
When I am back in the White House, rogue federal agencies and Soros-funded DAs will no longer be allowed to treat honest, law-abiding Americans as second-class citizens.
When I am back in the White House, you will remember the glory days when America was a FREE, SAFE, PROSPEROUS, and GREAT NATION!
