clean_body: Did you see my NRA speech? | | | Friend, I had an incredible time at the NRA Convention on Friday, speaking to a room packed with patriots who want one very simple thing... to be FREE. The Left wants to take away your guns while throwing open the jailhouse doors and releasing blood-thirsty criminals into your communities. They want to abolish your borders and impoverish your families while spending your money on endless and very, very stupid foreign wars. They want to demonize patriots and persecute Christians while pushing the transgender cult on your children. But with your support, I promise to lead the great rebirth of American freedom. We will build a future where we are free of violence, free of crime, and free of fear. When I am back in the White House, rogue federal agencies and Soros-funded DAs will no longer be allowed to treat honest, law-abiding Americans as second-class citizens. When I am back in the White House, you will remember the glory days when America was a FREE, SAFE, PROSPEROUS, and GREAT NATION! Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States P.S. Fellow Conservatives,

_My family and I had a great time traveling across Indiana last week. We had the opportunity to meet with many fellow Hoosiers who are tired of the Left’s grip on Washington, D.C. I was grateful to have the opportunity to travel the state with my daughters and remind them what makes Indiana so special._

**_Only in America_** can the son of a factory worker and nursing home cook grow up to become a Congressman and, hopefully, the next Conservative Senator for the state of Indiana. clean_body: I’m in this with you | Fellow Conservatives, My family and I had a great time traveling across Indiana last week. We had the opportunity to meet with many fellow Hoosiers who are tired of the Left’s grip on Washington, D.C. I was grateful to have the opportunity to travel the state with my daughters and remind them what makes Indiana so special. | This is one of many opportunities I will have to connect with fellow Americans and understand their vision for our country. America is the greatest country in the world, and I intend to protect it at all costs. Only in America can the son of a factory worker and nursing home cook grow up to become a Congressman and, hopefully, the next Conservative Senator for the state of Indiana. I am running for the Senate to protect the freedoms and opportunities that allowed me to live the American dream for my daughters and for future generations. Sincerely, | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Andy Beshear
subject: This is our moment.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Chip in to my re-election ahead of our midnight deadline. Hey Peter,

You only get one chance to make a first impression. And we have an opportunity tonight to put our best foot forward.

Tonight at midnight is the 30-day pre-primary reporting deadline for candidates in the governor's race. Soon after, election year fundraising numbers will go public for the first time. This is our chance to show my opponents, Kentuckians, and the country the strength of our grassroots movement.

My opponents are looking for any opportunity or sign of weakness from our team. They've been attacking me from the start, and I don't expect them to slow down any time soon.

As we get closer to November, millions more will likely be poured into this race by my opponents and the outside groups supporting them. I can't afford to lose any time or momentum. And tonight's deadline is our first big test.

**I need to know that you're on board, Peter. Will you chip in to my re-election campaign before midnight tonight and help me build a strong campaign to win this November? Any dollar amount helps >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-april23-filing?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61893541/401544434/523659758?refcode=em23_230416_filng4_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230416_filng4_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=37214371-95dc-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzIxNDM3MS05NWRjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D5OWPAmLyo8AxsfvDlmsHtTWWNMPlWXNzVOo-h9PPQ4=)**

I’m running for Congress again because in the world’s wealthiest nation, no one should go without basic necessities.
And instead of fighting for working families, Republicans in Congress want to take away more reproductive rights, slash Social Security and Medicare, and block civil rights for LGBTQ+ Americans like me.
**In 2022, we ran a grassroots-powered campaign backed by thousands of donors like you – real people, not special interests and corporate PACs. And with your help, we’ll run an even stronger race.**

Here in California’s High Desert, we’re already seeing the effects of climate change. We need the Green New Deal to create jobs, generate clean energy, and help us build resilient communities for generations to come.
I watched as a cousin was nearly denied health care unless we were able to pay in advance. In Congress, I’ll work towards Medicare for All, because no one should lack health care in a nation as wealthy as ours.
And as an LGBTQ+ American, I’m appalled at the rising tide of hatred and bigotry from right-wing extremists. I’ll fight for the Equality Act, because no one should face state-sponsored discrimination.

body:

| Thanks to Trump’s far-right Supreme Court Justices like Brett Kavanaugh and Clarence Thomas, public opinion of the Court is PLUMMETING.

**_As a trusted Democrat in your city, do YOU approve of the Supreme Court?_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/SCOTUS_poll23/?source=VPP_20230416_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=6&akid=7136%2E878179%2EJB5W3n) | [NO, I DON’T APPROVE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/SCOTUS_poll23/?source=VPP_20230416_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=7136%2E878179%2EJB5W3n)

* * *
The MAGA majority on the Supreme Court is OUT OF CONTROL:

❌ They DESTROYED _Roe v. Wade_ and are on track to BAN abortion pills.
❌ They GUT the Voting Rights Act any chance they get.
❌ Clarence Thomas took lavish BRIBES from a GOP mega donor.

With upcoming cases challenging so many things like elections, student loan forgiveness, and reproductive freedom – **_we’re worried!_**
**So we need to hear from 10,000 supporters before midnight.**
[**Answer Immediately: Do you approve of the Supreme Court?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/SCOTUS_poll23/?source=VPP_20230416_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=10&akid=7136%2E878179%2EJB5W3n)

name: Sen. Sherrod Brown
subject: What is important to you, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
Friend, if there’s one thing you should know about me, it’s this:
I’ve dedicated my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the belief that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are or what kind of work you do. For me, this means going to bat for working families in Ohio and across the country. It means making sure _your_ __ voice is heard in the halls of Congress and on the Senate floor.
I’m proud of the progress we’ve made in the last couple of years, including passing a historic infrastructure bill and standing up for workers’ rights. **But we’ve still got a long way to go, so as we chart out our next steps, I’m asking folks like you to weigh in.**
I’ve always said the best ideas don’t come from Washington – they come from the people we serve. In an ideal world, I’d get to sit down and chat with each and every member of this grassroots team to find out which issues are keeping you up at night, what makes you hopeful about our future, and what you want to see Democrats accomplish next. But since I can only be in one place at a time, our 2023 Priorities Survey is the next best thing:
[**So please, friend, will you take just a moment now to share your thoughts with me in our new priorities survey? Your unique perspective is critical to helping us defend this seat, keep the Senate blue, and continue making progress for working families.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61894100/401546559/-176176352?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk113-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmIxMDc1OC05YWRjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LnrdVfHctujs3dy5z2C9lR0kcwhx_mZKMbq_F_zOOAw=&emci=7b600a7b-b1d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=dbb10758-9adc-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)
| | [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61894101/401546560/-176176352?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk113-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmIxMDc1OC05YWRjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LnrdVfHctujs3dy5z2C9lR0kcwhx_mZKMbq_F_zOOAw=&emci=7b600a7b-b1d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=dbb10758-9adc-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)

With gratitude,

Sherrod Brown

name: Katie for California
subject: This is wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
One of the largest packaged food companies in the country posted a nearly 60% profit increase last quarter.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=21311%2E3422442%2Ecg3vvy)
Derek,
One of the largest packaged food companies in the country posted a nearly 60% profit increase between December 2022 and February 2023— _reporting a net income of $342 million in one financial quarter._
Meanwhile, families are struggling to afford their groceries.
This is yet another example of corporate greed going unchecked while directly hurting American families—**and an example of the CEOs and corporations Katie Porter will hold accountable in the U.S. Senate.**
**[Please make a contribution of $5 today to send Katie to the Senate so she can fight for families and hold corporate greed accountable.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230416-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAG16_1_GRO_20230416_V1_F&refcode2=21311_3422442_cg3vvy&akid=21311%2E3422442%2Ecg3vvy)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230416-1?refcode=EMAG16_1_GRO_20230416_V1_F&refcode2=21311_3422442_cg3vvy&akid=21311%2E3422442%2Ecg3vvy)**
Companies like Cal-Maine, Kraft-Heinz, and Conagra, all reported huge profit increases over the past year. These companies control long lists of brands you've heard of, like Reddi Whip and Marie Calendars, and their monopoly power over the grocery market is allowing them to price gouge families.
Katie has made lowering costs and standing up to corporate greed one of her top priorities in the House, and has demanded answers from companies like Cal-Maine. As a single parent of three kids, she knows that families struggle when CEOs decide to price gouge.
**[We need a warrior like Katie in the Senate. Please make a contribution today so Katie can fight back against corporate greed and help build a country that works for _all_ of us.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230416-1?refcode=EMAG16_1_GRO_20230416_V1_F&refcode2=21311_3422442_cg3vvy&akid=21311%2E3422442%2Ecg3vvy)
Thanks for your support,
Katie for California

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAG16_1_GRO_20230416_V1_F&t=5&refcode2=21311_3422442_cg3vvy&akid=21311%2E3422442%2Ecg3vvy)**

Meanwhile, families are struggling to afford their groceries. This is yet another example of corporate greed going unchecked while directly hurting American families—and an example of the CEOs and corporations Katie Porter will hold accountable in the U.S. Senate. Companies like Cal-Maine, Kraft-Heinz, and Conagra, all reported huge profit increases over the past year. These companies control long lists of brands you've heard of, like Reddi Whip and Marie Calendars, and their monopoly power over the grocery market is allowing them to price gouge families. Katie has made lowering costs and standing up to corporate greed one of her top priorities in the House, and has demanded answers from companies like Cal-Maine. As a single parent of three kids, she knows that families struggle when CEOs decide to price gouge. Thanks for your support, Katie for California Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a328d2ef052415d979d6c73e7a7630b&_e=wbmBWWcxSmjyFsl61olimn5MiZcn3naAgVGFkI08ZPDX_hDr-YGy05T29sWVY7joY8viKY2ZCrvUJqbAQ0WA0I0cQ4aUiP0c4LBjXHZT0BL0vruEoCSuMqMG0EEZi-wsiPnHP9BpubtM477RNGxh9d1s-FIvUoDLN8owyklfOARDh2wzLcRcn1oeTV-aEo_WVJ_yfF8MC8DncJjGagtiFrIYaeYxg65CA7TW2AIi4IJKjRUt5Jo615n3QWt6ZYFJd-N8MeA4sEIuWRUUbxF2A0Cn8lrp_b9e9gMaa0H38h_4ER_SSk1p9_Mur6-Nbmh-Kebh2SmCKQiuFB2gwEglEgsX2b4iWVkDPE4G42rM_2PPDLofpfVkqNBvau0UE43tC3OSyREi6rt26dfpupNnyQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a328d2ef052415d979d6c73e7a7630b&_e=wbmBWWcxSmjyFsl61olimn5MiZcn3naAgVGFkI08ZPDX_hDr-YGy05T29sWVY7joY8viKY2ZCrvUJqbAQ0WA0I0cQ4aUiP0c4LBjXHZT0BL0vruEoCSuMqMG0EEZi-wsiPnHP9BpubtM477RNGxh9d1s-FIvUoDLN8owyklfOARDh2wzLcRcn1oeTV-aEo_WVJ_yfF8MC8DncJjGagtiFrIYaeYxg65CA7TW2AIi4IJKjRUt5Jo615n3QWt6ZYFJ8vRcxoHQrI3nsSzGu6zpImv-Zzonpdj7SJjqPYydrR0SbhItTXdZdQIGeJqsQ6kZmP1R9MO58cL-vGUq8YGWyjDHunLncf_ng_fJjxDu4jVhcLuEU2RZtq-IKo2XmdwJDxe5hp2NDXQCjlw2sai68A%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a328d2ef052415d979d6c73e7a7630b&_e=wbmBWWcxSmjyFsl61olimn5MiZcn3naAgVGFkI08ZPDX_hDr-YGy05T29sWVY7joY8viKY2ZCrvUJqbAQ0WA0I0cQ4aUiP0c4LBjXHZT0BL0vruEoCSuMqMG0EEZi-wsiPnHP9BpubtM477RNGxh9d1s-FIvUoDLN8owyklfOARDh2wzLcRcn1oeTV-aEo_WVJ_yfF8MC8DncJjGagtiFrIYaeYxg65CA7TW2AIi4IJKjRUt5Jo615n3QWt6ZYFJ_GMp3YqfjcRcSVp0c0zELGqVvQoR3SDkYn-uBm_RP3r5abaREPA6MSaHTb-iUPNUDJ3R-yFxD80noRAbJsMsmavlacQwsVGuDyLiohnpXQ1jMiHiax1vBYqQwZ4jzpnf8LE-Ld5yzw76XpbTBIVq4A%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

Friend,
I sat down with Tucker Carlson on Tuesday night for my FIRST INTERVIEW since I was arrested and arraigned.
_Tucker asked if there 's **ANYTHING** the Democrats could throw at me that would make me drop out of the presidential race._
Without hesitation, I said, _**" NO. I'D NEVER DROP OUT."**_
Because the fate of America hangs in the balance - and I will _NEVER SURRENDER_ our country to the radical Left.
If an unjust, and possibly illegal, ARREST didn't even make me flinch - then I promise you, NOTHING WILL.
**Now, I 'm asking YOU to stand with me as the Left tries to throw everything they can at us to _force me out of the presidential election._**

| | April 16, 2023
---
| WEEKLY NEWSLETTER
---
| Issue 8
---
| | **A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)** When I grew up, the idea was to be colorblind. To judge one another based on the content of our character and not on the color of our skin. That doesn’t seem to be the case anymore. Nowadays, individuals are judged by their political affiliation. In recent weeks, some students at George Mason University (GMU) seemed traumatized by the school’s decision to select Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin as their commencement speaker in May. GMU’s Democrat student organization protested the announcement on social media, on campus, and through a petition, even calling the Governor a “bigot” and demanding that their peers stand with them in solidarity. These dissenters are the vocal minority. They do not represent what the vast majority of students at GMU believe. Using names like racist, bigot, and fascist to describe a person from the opposite political party not only diminishes the meaning of the terms but it hurts those who have experienced racism, bigotry, and oppression. What makes this even more ironic is that Governor Youngkin is expected to present a lifetime achievement medal to a Vietnamese-American refugee couple who came to the United States with nothing to their name and paid through their good fortune, providing millions of dollars in scholarships to first and second-generation Americans. Where does this type of progressive activism first take hold of students? Look no further than Fairfax County and Loudoun County Public Schools. We continue to see countless examples of school administrators inserting ‘equity’ and political ideology in the classroom. It’s no wonder some students go on to college, where they become foot soldiers for the Democrat Party. I joined Unleash America PAC to stop the severe decline in the classroom thanks to the progressive Left. Join our mission at Unleash America to elect leaders and support policies that protect an education that promotes freedom of opinion and leaves harmful ideology out of the lesson plan. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET), Honorary Chairman of [Unleash America PAC](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=4b40e89c14364dca9a10b2a53695e0b5&_e=hriA8Im7WZB4h8K3nEkwWr-KMGQuLJoYLucwpq4K1FywsN25cJnMSbN8XYSPX11q28wIJO3aF60SuSHwkk8BVTMtnq3lFO-HeJSZn8pBfwGxlEATcX3x9FJNnr4qZm29y33g-sY3XYaZGwSkk68nl_vgy4WCx1vFfyKZl_Nt6iomwC63_a8GRhZ10FE40YyHnz7YNnkzh1-sV1rLdg5xqw8b9avPosNIxYHA533Rxtq20w2FjcHH9NArD5rIuh_iHYQETKbo5zzqJfy0GPZiYCfC2KtOPqE-rNf29Q8soo4%3D)

clean_body: | | | | | April 16, 2023 | WEEKLY NEWSLETTER | Issue 8 | | A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) When I grew up, the idea was to be colorblind. To judge one another based on the content of our character and not on the color of our skin. That doesn’t seem to be the case anymore. Nowadays, individuals are judged by their political affiliation. In recent weeks, some students at George Mason University (GMU) seemed traumatized by the school’s decision to select Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin as their commencement speaker in May. GMU’s Democrat student organization protested the announcement on social media, on campus, and through a petition, even calling the Governor a “bigot” and demanding that their peers stand with them in solidarity. These dissenters are the vocal minority. They do not represent what the vast majority of students at GMU believe. Using names like racist, bigot, and fascist to describe a person from the opposite political party not only diminishes the meaning of the terms but it hurts those who have experienced racism, bigotry, and oppression. What makes this even more ironic is that Governor Youngkin is expected to present a lifetime achievement medal to a Vietnamese-American refugee couple who came to the United States with nothing to their name and paid through their good fortune, providing millions of dollars in scholarships to first and second-generation Americans. Where does this type of progressive activism first take hold of students? Look no further than Fairfax County and Loudoun County Public Schools. We continue to see countless examples of school administrators inserting ‘equity’ and political ideology in the classroom. It’s no wonder some students go on to college, where they become foot soldiers for the Democrat Party. I joined Unleash America PAC to stop the severe decline in the classroom thanks to the progressive Left. Join our mission at Unleash America to elect leaders and support policies that protect an education that promotes freedom of opinion and leaves harmful ideology out of the lesson plan. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET), Honorary Chairman of | IN CASE YOU MISSED IT Cao writes in Townhall, “Our escape from Vietnam, life in Africa, and our eventual return to the U.S. spurred me on to a life of service. I deployed in combat to Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia, serving alongside Special Forces and SEAL Teams. Throughout various stages of my life, I have seen my share of death and destruction at the hands of political leaders across the world, and I can tell you from my own personal experience: no money in the world can save you from the grips of authoritarian rule.” | Social Media to Share Here are a few of our top posts from social media this week. Be sure to like and share, and when you tweet at Hung remember to use #UnleashAmerica! | | | | | | That's it for this week, thank you for reading. Be sure to follow Unleash America on social media! | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Unleash America PAC

I'm humbled and honored to have this grassroots support. Because of our small-dollar donors last cycle, we flipped this seat and kept a far-right Trump loyalist OUT of office.
Now, with so much at stake for our democracy, we have to keep it up.

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Citizens’ Grand Jury to seek indictment of NYC District Attorney Alvin Bragg
body:
New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people.

New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people.

**Like I told you yesterday, this shocking indictment threatens the rule of law, honest elections, and the future of our country.**

What's more, what District Attorney Bragg has done is **ILLEGAL.**

So once again, Freedom Watch turns to its Citizens' Grand Jury. We're going to seek a criminal indictment against Alvin Bragg for his crime...and we're going to seek justice, peacefully and legally.

[ **Patriot, please help Freedom Watch fully fund this critically important effort with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY.** ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2b6a8e92dfe0436bb5c6129aa5b6e98d&_e=KMSbepNxhKxV2mlb54PtRAy9xpEAo2uW9el8x7p37zRUSxQH9j55uXNJdA1Cy7G-Wq1LxF9hYEfu4TgKge3x7uW4I6mcvBu3lbR1kG08dnq4ahGLqrUa4jDywxD_sTeYBr7IZMkoneFeKJRleIRCylMJx4ZJVHCNl_6UrLorw7o12W9ju5boO-tYpKqLhxb-GZKpXYgrRpgjKYLeSKTAGrpAmjAxij4GluM7y-RxZAvNM3TJQeh_ESXJooHu0VjWyWhHvYyP_kJocal0Pk_S5Zj93rk5sVqDBUYU8J2F381v2x47t5TlFDarK5DRVN9h)

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. **

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years. You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I 'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. And the only lawyer to enjoin the National Security Agency from conducting mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of American citizens. **

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and WIN.**

[ **The time to act is now. Please help us fully fund our fight against the injustice of Biden 's corrupt regime. ** ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2b6a8e92dfe0436bb5c6129aa5b6e98d&_e=KMSbepNxhKxV2mlb54PtRAy9xpEAo2uW9el8x7p37zRUSxQH9j55uXNJdA1Cy7G-Wq1LxF9hYEfu4TgKge3x7uW4I6mcvBu3lbR1kG08dnq4ahGLqrUa4jDywxD_sTeYBr7IZMkoneFeKJRleIRCylMJx4ZJVHCNl_6UrLorw7p02VNTu_Rq8HzYBXDux1_vZ1j6QXjUSk2YYg1SZJvEaTuYQCBaMEXlGl8LesVXwWHPyvvXCpOC-adluIZT6ODrbnbic_H2l8BdaFR5FkGyseUWYilOZcnOlBx5AVjwNvw6nmhB3fjZiFBwMhrNAcU2)

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, you and I can 't let George Soros-backed District Attorney Alvin Bragg get away with his illegal indictment of President Trump. **

[ **Please help Freedom Watch fight back peacefully and legally with your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right away.** ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2b6a8e92dfe0436bb5c6129aa5b6e98d&_e=KMSbepNxhKxV2mlb54PtRAy9xpEAo2uW9el8x7p37zRUSxQH9j55uXNJdA1Cy7G-Wq1LxF9hYEfu4TgKge3x7uW4I6mcvBu3lbR1kG08dnq4ahGLqrUa4jDywxD_sTeYBr7IZMkoneFeKJRleIRCylMJx4ZJVHCNl_6UrLorw7oqnlu3ct6TRLU23WlgOzgngjlycKJY1-_NrWbAf9f-xSRn_szIddKPabr_ZA9JTVODloP_e6jj31GKhGESH8IHV6n0tCuyNaEHrWHyxg4xQjcH6RwJrbEBgBhbf_SExJcI4tuEhXIyGGFxt79fKBu_)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Needed: STOP Bayer-Monsanto from putting pollinators, people, and the planet at RISK
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1723939?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Pollinator populations are DYING OUT while Bayer-Monsanto continues to profit off BEE-TOXIC pesticides!** Bayer-Monsanto has __**MANIPULATED**__ science and __**EVADED**__ regulations while __**LYING**__ to the public about the **dangers** of toxic pesticides. Neonics have made agriculture almost **50 times more toxic** to insects and are _**LETHAL**_ to bees. Many toxic pesticides sold by companies like Bayer are linked to **human health impacts** \-- like increased risk of cancer, reproductive problems, and neurological damage. Friend, will you sit back and allow Bayer-Monsanto to keep selling toxic pesticides that are threatening the health of people, pollinators, and our planet? [**Or will you DEMAND accountability from Big Ag and take action now -- before our urgent deadline at 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1723940?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1723941?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_**40%**_ **of all insect pollinators, including many wild bee species, are on the** **_BRINK OF EXTINCTION_**.
Bees and other insect pollinators are an integral part of our ecosystems, and we depend on them for **1 in 3 bites** of food that we eat. Imagine how empty our grocery store shelves would be without these helpful creatures -- _**we wouldn’t have many of the most nutritious fruits, veggies, and nuts we depend on**_!
But pesticide giants don't seem to be concerned about these devastating consequences to our food supply. Instead, corporations like Bayer-Monsanto are prioritizing their profits and spending **BIG** on **disinformation campaigns** to **deny and distract** from their role in bee deaths.
**It’s a good thing that environmentalists like you won’t be fooled by Bayer-Monsanto’s corporate lies though, Friend.** _**That’s why we know we can count on you to take action today.**_ [**Add your name now to STOP Bayer-Monsanto from selling toxic neonics! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1723942?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1723943?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for taking urgent action.
Friends of the Earth**
|

Can we count on you?

– GA Dems

These races are about more than just the two districts. Democrats hold the Pennsylvania House by an incredibly narrow margin, so it's critical that we defend every seat.
We’re just a month away from these two special elections, so we need to mobilize every voter in these races if we want to win. That means raising funds, reaching out to volunteers, and building a coalition to cross the finish line.
**To do that, it’ll take grassroots supporters – every member of this team – rising up to support our state Democrats and support building Democratic power in battleground states like Pennsylvania.**
[Click here to make a donation and support state Democrats running in special elections in states like Pennsylvania. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zg_VLrMrMFvj2eg_NergVk0RMpp5VCBNbBXS7sUaF4ON3fPz1VUcyE1oLnE0osG5BH20L61EAJwkN3lCJfcH4o2hWvVeCGPVE0mZeh0-KViWisk2cXgrOjm5VQQ0Vnw0MGChDc442UdtUGB8pQeWtav9FPkKd3qAihJALVi7sGFdo4eggAnsrfdBcs0V3-s1LhR_qDFR3ZjZNzGiBbxwYGF49YYkGpVRwFOS-oY-aZxYPPyozgPGUAU62OKimMrGwMTPv6yUb1ZkAszkCfa3VOoR8hQUdEJGe8UVZAL66ovOeqQSy222ARslo5oW9CElUItQf2JE_swzoPFvuLpBI2xJx5WIBgfzXOVRVh1v0_HTVYqFAs7qazcVKAWK5WwHDqaG4XaKE088-5jdUbYne_f5ggxfdHaLZ6yeAUfV3IQnuzPmoc4Oo2emx15dAJA76cVWf6nfpRFujvHwQpPEXL-3H45rE_HRXrqiXNWSBhoQp8dH25U6j1ZjYd6OVHPncbdAoduaKOC3Gxy8CF-waqqalxmNTb9sXN0G6Q5FfFJuFBgkvPJgVELMyc7Y4A38j_uqKYBetlGVKYpH19ebD2939W0OawKd3dE-Q8mHWklw/3ve/YivyhGeMR1eST_kIZn3mFg/h6/0EOuu6mGaCp74A-gGFuZkBjBv0OOXkRGX1dxQt7BZoo)

clean_body: Next month, Pennsylvania voters will head to the ballot box for two special elections that will determine whether Democrats retain control of the state House. | | | | | Next month, Pennsylvania voters will head to the ballot box for two special elections that will determine whether Democrats retain control of the state House. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | These races are about more than just the two districts. Democrats hold the Pennsylvania House by an incredibly narrow margin, so it's critical that we defend every seat. We’re just a month away from these two special elections, so we need to mobilize every voter in these races if we want to win. That means raising funds, reaching out to volunteers, and building a coalition to cross the finish line. To do that, it’ll take grassroots supporters – every member of this team – rising up to support our state Democrats and support building Democratic power in battleground states like Pennsylvania. Friend, in 2022, with the odds stacked against us, Democrats made history by holding down and expanding our Senate majority. **After the conservative Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade in June, and Republicans started threatening a national abortion ban, we knew we couldn't rest for a second.**

Now, the GOP has taken back the House, and they're using their power at every level of government to attack our fundamental rights. Just last week, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas overturned FDA approval of mifepristone, the most commonly used method of abortion in America.

And now, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is on the verge of signing a bill to ban abortion after just six weeks – a point at which most women don't even know they are pregnant.

**Let me be perfectly clear: They will not stop until abortion is outlawed in America.**
We need to get to work today if we want to have a chance at protecting our reproductive rights and holding Republicans accountable for their blatant attacks on our fundamental freedoms.

There is a disturbing trend on the left

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c66438d2833c4d8fa989d5a58eb23132&_e=uFgIum462kDaMvhFyTE24DFhKlvAwIQo5CAkjKh9ZYjJQjTjlkA3SclCMKzNuJhrhMfJ45nGMYDtSp0Cl8fbydJa4echVZgUx_jEp51u0wda7u3EDsGVExEuKiRpabJPq9rUvJxHO2uyBF_DSglMab3JmrBxWxh5jVaTuG1adv_Mb8QnP3x8cX8aXZQJQX4S6GgT062OX_Rum1-TSmL-SKr_HB2t8qBMknzclwXA4jd1M4wtcZxWawTvccplxltlgP6ASeLWqoh12MJoCqGKgg%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

There is a disturbing trend on the left-- Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them. Time after time, we watch the left enable the rhetoric and justify the violence-- **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** This weekend, I was ambushed and assaulted by a transgender activist after speaking to a group of students at San Francisco State University. Students gathered wanting to hear the pro-woman side of the sports debate but were impeded by transgender activists, shouting, cursing, and threatening. This left-wing intimidation campaign won't work! This is only more evidence that I'm fighting the good fight, and proof that women need sex-protected spaces! I know what I'm doing is right. When they want you silent, speak louder. I'm on the frontlines fighting for women and girls and speaking TRUTH to all, even those who refuse to hear it. [**Will you step up and stand with me in this fight? Dear Friend, The culture war is coming to corporate America. That’s why [**RedBalloon.work**](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJxckc-u1CAUh5-G7qaBQ4cZFl14raOJGo2Lm7giDNCWyp-Gwq3j05s29cbcDTn5ODnw_Y70s7P9o0WXJwQwWr0gAETfIYDh-WUqP-DP13zqnuPpw-S_4O0S3iOA_JjNa-cxpDZeWrfRS1fp9n6-KsYr0xJ2JexKz_xaja3RV8yNwUo1_EwluyuG77gnjLCmZ1hVtgUMFDeEARB-JjXXmNOGSKN0w_mlRw32D-lNskqGWeZkY65jGirXjjnPy_6nG4Lbuq51MvounYsx1GtMvxDcdAynKSF6K1Yj2hEELL5Wsu_3GhCwpdwJop2OQUwl2Jg2WLIX3mhbPKLd4bvDJZakDKLdf7EF5cSRzdGlpJ-lHcL2xOYIp-0QebSLsIuQYiyDEVK_yKCMsEHk0QhVXC7JiFUmkYwWh5Dwcv43NoZsQka0C8qd0vefnvdPn_QNARPB7UZv4L5p2g2_P-fpG_5YpVbPq3XOLuyCGjxsZrWK_m8AAAD__y94rsE) is so important for our nation’s future. subject: Here’s how I’d fix things in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It's time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology.

| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6ee9970247544a1494859213bb093b49&_e=08z2bj8PEviJxIEFonGi19dFd4vhzIB9Q3yirSzeFMiqyX5jxuwo3UwFhEtm_owTgTDtDbYlQEBXCnXE4-X0k9WRlP8VKrdcxusIGyFvBOUn_yDGCHklAXV3zJ8j7A1Yrhe2TR-VPU-7GMHt9R2OIJyROYVa6AgIBKSR_9ec1H7zkMFCsD02Z2K1Zx-t5IFIF-AIuDe_JHHQtxM6DkP3t5aaENs6h6xSpyIAroJXSMIxkAsLjfH7db7KvCJF7ouk6itvnHoiyhfdin-cna_72luoEFlBy4dkszHlrqNbywOIBtWC_C7pp7m9Oq-iXq-DmOXNR9XdNbatON3IYd3GQh-srqDztt7ZTgbl6hFNWk6J_ig7oREJm247IlZZ-Vft)
Fellow American -

Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival.

Here's one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America.

Time to stop complaining and actually *fix* the problem without apology.
1. Shut down + replace the FBI
2. Shut down + replace the IRS
3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process
4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims
5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can't be weaponized to protect a select few.

Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. **[Chip in $1 to build this movement toward our American revival.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6ee9970247544a1494859213bb093b49&_e=08z2bj8PEviJxIEFonGi19dFd4vhzIB9Q3yirSzeFMiqyX5jxuwo3UwFhEtm_owTgTDtDbYlQEBXCnXE4-X0k9WRlP8VKrdcxusIGyFvBOUn_yDGCHklAXV3zJ8j7A1Yrhe2TR-VPU-7GMHt9R2OIJyROYVa6AgIBKSR_9ec1H7zkMFCsD02Z2K1Zx-t5IFIF-AIuDe_JHHQtxM6DkP3t4yc_WTrEP1T2k6OSNChJq6M_n0ZvyIC6GjgwgCuume40KrnbY_FweHXzlcCW_P1gLD80olvC0MLbY6ogyBN1GlZbpEsX4CGLdjpyJ3YeG4jf7MQ2ram86zuMYHmFYFxt6tqTQ98GpwnlBOsN5paaBp1EBrKOnWKkJL3evTKvvQ3)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

subject: Taking the fight to corrupt teachers unions
body:
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxskT2PnDwQxz_N0C0yY_BCQfE8IaSKUt0VaZCxx7vW-U3GZEU-fbToLsUp7c-j_5ulT86aY4Tr_4B4t3oDROD_AeJe-Kt8efmej4v4-uPyrXvF2_MRvwBiORL9vXwXqclL6570OlV6bFE2RlU0NqJvRC-wweo-rrJB1g0GUXBhWoNskH3LO-q6lfVDX9kRGXLWNgI545zVql-xY2rtTMN02w_QstOoNpmo3G14o6yldUetoq_ceC8lbWewGXDeSO2ZahlIx_K8AJyTzBTKtgcbQzTSU7ZKAs7RHT5ZBXzei1-2uGdFwCdTNKB4Ik_a7h749N70hEr6JO0tAJ_O3O3ln_qLjkEWG8MSU7He_qblc4Ely6CT3N2y5vhGWd5o-RjjwyyGQqEAn4Jyl65VR3n0QzaAYgnOauDTJ3j-KZ8evx5zXuPPKo86PaxzdhNXaNntnFJF_ycAAP__mQiqjg)
Friend,

Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

They have taken over classrooms and indoctrinated hundreds of thousands of students with Critical Race Theory. They would rather focus lessons on pronouns and gender identity than teach trade skills, science, or basic math.

_It's no wonder our kids have developed the highest levels of anxiety and depression in the world._

I'd like to introduce you to an organization that is leading the fight to take back our school boards from the radical Left and protect our children, **Parents Union of America (PUOA).**

I just talked with Jessi Melton, President of PUOA, and told her that I would reach out to my supporters and help raise $15,000 this week to fund their efforts.

[_**Friend, can I count on you to share my support for PUOA? Click here to donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount today >>>**_](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxskT2P1DwQxz_NpNvIGXudbJHieQiBBiGE7gqayLEnu9b5DcdhFT492uiO4kT78-j_ZuWTs8veQ_s_IN6sWQER-H-AuBX-rJ6evuT9JD9-PX06P-P18YgfALHsif5evorU5JV1D9oOlekFqmbRFfWN7BrZSWywuvWSSXFR-nJeOKpZNK2-UNMxIzhiK5isbI8MORONRM44Z7XuZjwzPZ-XhhnRXUCww6heMlG52fBC2Sjr9lpHX7n-Vkpaj2Aj4LiS3jLVKpCJ5XEBOCaVKZR1CzaGuChP2WoFOEa3-2Q18HErflrjljUBH5ZiAOUDeTJ288CH16YH1MonZa8B-HDkFqd_6k8mBlVsDFNMxXr7m6b3Baasgklqc9Oc4wtldaXpbYw3sxgKhQJ8CNqdvs3iO__8U-kAKKfgrAE-vIPHn_Lh_us-5jn-qHJv0t06Z1fZgmDXY0od_Z8AAAD__35RqkQ)

I want to share a message from PUOA:

_**" We stand as a counter-offensive **__**against the powerful, agenda-driven Teachers' Union**_ _**, which has systematically sought to destroy wholesome American values and indoctrinate our children."**_

_Parents Union of America is the ANTI teachers-union_.

Their mission is to target the most populous school districts and remove the incompetent school board members put in place by the Anti-American, corrupt Teachers' Union.

**I, for one, am sick and tired of socialists indoctrinating our children. And the corrupt Teacher Unions are to blame.**

We can't allow the same people who turn a blind eye to inappropriate textbook material and socialist indoctrination to remain in charge of American schools.

[_**Will you join the fight to save America 's schools from the corrupt Teacher's Union? Please send your urgent donation NOW >>> **_](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxskbtu3DoQhp9m1K1ADSmuXKg4J7KcJkgTu0gjUORolzFvoKhslKcPVrBTGGk_Dv4blU_OLnsP5_8B8WrNCojA_wPErfAX9fz8Je8n-fj19NS-4OX-iJ8AseyJ_l6-idTklXV3eh4q0wtUzaIr6hvZNbKT2GB17ZUURKhFw00ndcux5bN4EHODomO4mMr2yJAz0UjkjHNW627Glum5XRpmRPcAgh1G9ZKJytWGV8pGWbfXOvrK9ddS0noEGwHHlfSWqVaBTCz3C8AxqUyhrFuwMcRFecpWK8Axut0nq4GPW_HTGresCfiwFAMo78iTsZsHPrw1PaBWPil7CcCHI7c4_VN_MjGoYmOYYirW2980fSwwZRVMUpub5hxfKasLTe9jvJvFUCgU4EPQ7vTj8VtLn389eQKUU3DWAB8-wONP-XD7eRvzHL9XuTfpZp2zqzyDYJdjSh39nwAAAP__Fvqq2g)

PUOA does more than fight to remove corrupt school board members. They work to fill school boards with America-First candidates and parents.

They plan to replace corrupt school board members with America-First candidates. They recruit and train conservative candidates and raise money to get them elected. These candidates MUST display the ability and willingness to fight for conservative values by going on the offensive.

**Parents Union of America refuses to stay on the defensive when our children are involved. **

I know this is a lot to ask, but can you help me keep my promise to raise $15,000 this week for Parents Union of America?

** Click below to send your gift.**

They would rather focus lessons on pronouns and gender identity than teach trade skills, science, or basic math. It's no wonder our kids have developed the highest levels of anxiety and depression in the world. I'd like to introduce you to an organization that is leading the fight to take back our school boards from the radical Left and protect our children, Parents Union of America (PUOA). I just talked with Jessi Melton, President of PUOA, and told her that I would reach out to my supporters and help raise $15,000 this week to fund their efforts. I want to share a message from PUOA: " We stand as a counter-offensive against the powerful, agenda-driven Teachers' Union , which has systematically sought to destroy wholesome American values and indoctrinate our children." Parents Union of America is the ANTI teachers-union. Their mission is to target the most populous school districts and remove the incompetent school board members put in place by the Anti-American, corrupt Teachers' Union. I, for one, am sick and tired of socialists indoctrinating our children. And the corrupt Teacher Unions are to blame. We can't allow the same people who turn a blind eye to inappropriate textbook material and socialist indoctrination to remain in charge of American schools. PUOA does more than fight to remove corrupt school board members. They work to fill school boards with America-First candidates and parents. They plan to replace corrupt school board members with America-First candidates. They recruit and train conservative candidates and raise money to get them elected. These candidates MUST display the ability and willingness to fight for conservative values by going on the offensive. Parents Union of America refuses to stay on the defensive when our children are involved. I know this is a lot to ask, but can you help me keep my promise to raise $15,000 this week for Parents Union of America? Click below to send your gift. Thank you, Senator Rand Paul

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Tell Sinema: confirm President Biden’s Labor Secretary
body:
Will Sinema stand in the way of protecting working people? | | | Peter – Last year Kyrsten Sinema **joined with Republicans to block one of President Biden’s key nominees in the Department of Labor** because he’d been *too* tough on wealthy corporations like Uber and Lyft that abuse their workers. Now **we’re facing a similar situation with President Biden's choice for Labor secretary, Julie Su**. Su is a champion for working people and not corporate interests– which is why President Biden nominated her, and exactly why Sinema might oppose her. According to news reports, Sinema is not yet saying how she’ll vote. Su is already the Deputy Labor Secretary and served for seven years as California’s Labor Secretary. Su is imminently qualified – but she’s opposed by the same corporate interests that fund Sinema’s campaigns. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEhlvfJ4xEMVazkbALJzLNGFdggWZ2RL6AtHmJK2r1mvygFz4mHbHBHjNKYMZTxt_xXVcHKyDSuRAOO6yEzI4t8d3V8LMi9s0tGn2l_JWgLq_xb-eiCT5N0tb-QZABWgLk4H7il0uKVqcb8LcZvXwfhkH7g5yBH4JNb1sdlBHeTyMYDHOQFRweP6McJOLPt1L10PsF7CojIkfdED7PFyky-l7oVgk7Ha2ncZTGPlsDi_o61c57qIkqT2d91JsSzlYrWqHP1jkM9E8HadPtr9lHfpvjSqwqfOIESdGJGq7pQqvM/3ve/IqM7qdLhQYicin6EuxzHhw/h0/AHTkjI6Ln-x4nJJLHWJCEzHqaM8RuiVxAcbbNorkorY) **That’s why** **we’re gathering signatures to tell Sinema: protect the interests of working people and confirm Julie Su for Labor Secretary.** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEhlvfJ4xEMVazkbALJzLNGFdggWZ2RL6AtHmJK2r1mvygFz4mHbHBHjNKYMZTxt_xXVcHKyDSuRAOO6yEzI4t8dxLLd-xrUl3TjhhA0B5Oq0OBBmDc6WQcy_jd1hgMq1vwpJKfdmzzaUpTQ1up8iLtiQBxUgduB0xkHdg217LS3B3wUFnksWmo5V9pmHOlb7XpC1KJHpLqoBrTsM3qysYPOTW0kl9qKdAaQPweqf0_xrUUDiPItAmU2rO4fwHL9GOU55H6fmD3TXU3D7nPhFnMzY2Uf3rWc6fX2qA721kfW2c/3ve/IqM7qdLhQYicin6EuxzHhw/h1/g9HqInygs5935GIrmybA7aSRxQyMBk0-D0QKZ6_2Cuw) As the Washington Post reported, Julie Su “earned a reputation as an advocate for immigrants and low-wage workers facing wage theft and other workplace exploitation. She also helped design a law that addressed the classification of workers as independent contractors but received pushback from Uber, Lyft and other tech companies.” Uber previously helped kill David Weil’s nomination at the Labor Department because of the same reason – and Sinema helped them do it. Now, history is repeating itself. **** **[Tell Kyrsten Sinema, it’s time to side with workers instead of the giant corporations that exploit them. Sign our petition to confirm Julie Su as the next Secretary of Labor.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEhlvfJ4xEMVazkbALJzLNGFdggWZ2RL6AtHmJK2r1mvygFz4mHbHBHjNKYMZTxt_xXVcHKyDSuRAOO6yEzI4t8d1XmwdJVfe4je8kTyas64xC3TVCFXxxbARVEaSe3IgmHUdxgQRFZKzUHZ73KTOwdt-XlCQwumJLb0mWNOdMbWgrTrzTc2YQp19sqKM7okCaNRi9th8ik0Q7CCJycnpve80kd-nNHvKFt7Vp4qnA8fn-1hQ12BvJlJP5TupYAf55ZcKv7YSsPTB0w98h8lOoGtT0WmuWgGo_7Cla7VHJTM7c/3ve/IqM7qdLhQYicin6EuxzHhw/h2/3MHfpDIWzPN8VQVy030-GuAlH7pR4N-L0dv7XbfxV6I)** Let’s try to get Kyrsten Sinema to do the right thing for once, and then let’s replace her with a Senator we can count on. Together we’ll elect better leadership for Arizona, -Replace Sinema and Change for Arizona 2024
